1.name: The Fool
1.love: You may enter into new relationships – which may be purely to seek sensual pleasures. You may even have clandestine romantic escapades. You are looking for some fun and excitement at the moment; commitments and responsibilities do not excite you. New love interests will entice you. You may meet someone charming. You would just love the feeling of falling in love. You are ready to do anything under the sun to woo and win over your love interest. Quiet moments spent with an attractive person shall be a source of bliss.A chance meeting with a long-lost friend or an ex-lover may well mark the beginning/renewal of a love affair. It may dawn to you what you thought was a casual fling has now progressed into a serious relationship. You are feeling very active and spirited to pursuit new dreams and are all set to take on risks. Relationships are fun as long as they are free from any expectations or commitments. Just take care that you do not break anyone's heart. An adventurous romantic outing would lift your spirits. You are ready to take risks in your love life. Someone may find your devil-may-care attitude very endearing.  You may befriend an interesting person; this can later turn into a serious relationship. You can expect a sudden twist in your existing relationship. You may plan a surprise outing or a night out with your mate.
1.career: Your innovative ideas may seem far-fetched at the first glance, but your faith and intention possess the power of converting them into reality. New opportunities shall open up from unexpected sources. You shall be eager and enthusiastic to start a new job or project. When presented with different options, ponder well about which one you choose. Acting rashly could result in taking wrong decisions for which you  may have to regret later. Students shall remain in the good books of their mentors and teachers.  This is a good time to make new beginnings and venture into new territories. New avenues will open up giving you ample chances to tap your latent potentials. The unemployed may find new job openings which would be well paying; while those already in a job may be transferred to a new department or be entrusted with a new task. A raise in salary is foreseen. Your child like enthusiasm and eagerness will help finish tasks quicker and in an innovative manner. You may come up with a new business idea or strategy. It would be wise to follow your own heart and move ahead with courage and conviction. You may enroll for a new course for higher education or learn a new skill. You may join a new club or be involved in a new extracurricular activity.
1.finance: The day is good with regards to your financial status. Positive outcomes will surprise you. Sudden gains are expected. Money shall flow in.You may come forward to help someone who is facing serious monetary problems. It is important that you keep your feet firmly on the ground while taking crucial financial decisions. Do not let your impulsiveness get the better of you. Assessing the risks would be crucial to arrive at a productive decision.The day augurs well for your money  matters. Be prepared for some pleasant surprises.  Social contacts will be instrumental in enhancing your financial status. You may come across new sources of earning income. Investments will yield profits. Speculations will pay handsomely. You may get a well-deserved increment in your salary. Your hard work will be more than adequately rewarded. You can now afford to splurge money on yourself. Get the new fancy car you always wanted to buy.  You may also indulge in small luxuries such as electronic gadgets and music disks/CDs. An older relative will be in a generous mood and may gift you some liquid cash. Just keep away from diverting your hard earned money in get-rich-quick schemes. You may take professional advice from an experienced financial expert who can guide you as to what to do with your money.

2.name: The Magician
2.love: You may reflect on your relationships and make efforts to ease out the differences between you two, if any. It’s time to bring about the desired changes in your love life you have been craving for long. It would not be difficult for you to smooth talk your way into somebody’s heart. Your alluring charisma will attract many admirers. Your words will work like magic and shall entice the members of opposite sex in a charming manner. A new affair is waiting to happen. You may meet someone interesting at the least romantic place. He/she could be an extremely creative person with outstanding communication skills. If wooing someone, you will succeed in winning over your love by your charming manners and enticing ploys. You will do all you can to make your beloved feel special and happy. Those already in a relationship can decide to take it to the next level of commitment and happiness. Take care not to hurt someone close with your harsh words. Remember, words have the power to make or break a relationship. It is also a good day to iron out any differences you may be facing in your relationship. It's time to kiss and make-up. Do not let a wonderful day go wasted.
2.career: This is the time to grow professionally and establish yourself well in your career. You are feeling very self-motivated and inspirational in this period. You will come up with creative ,innovative ideas which will give you an edge over your competitors. Your communications skills are at peak. You are totally geared to control things and make them work in your way. Use your organisational skills to their optimum best. You can start working on your dream project. You would be able to finally resolve a long-standing problem at work. You may come up with new ways to use your skills and resources to tide over the hurdles in an innovative manner. This will give you a feeling of immense relief and satisfaction. New opportunities will excite you. You are fully geared to venture into new arenas and tap unexplored possibilities. You shall be very charismatic and witty. You would be able to put across your innovative ideas in an eloquent and captivating manner. You can put your creative skills to the optimum use and make a mark for yourself. You can become a part of something grand and succeed using your sheer will-power and creative agility. Focus all your energies on one single goal and see the magic happen.
2.finance: You have been gradually progressing toward your objectives; you can not gain momentum and surge ahead. It is time to effectively use your talents, skills, and resources to accomplish your goals.Circumstances now are favorable for you to  metamorphose your dreams into reality. You can use your potentials and will to make and multiply money and improve your financial status. Goodwill can also earn you a comfortable income. Your financial status is quite comfortable at this time. Monetary issues are not a bother at all.  New money earning prospects are making their way towards you. Cash will flow in from any source; could be a new job, a new project, an increment and yes, through inheritance too! It is time to grab opportunities and convert them into wealth. You shall be able to clear all your pending bills. But bear in mind, this is not the time to be spendthrift or to make unwise investments. You will need to take prudent decisions to plough  back your earnings into more productive and long terms securities and savings. Be careful while signing business deals. Get all the documents checked by expert professionals and avoid all underhand dealings. You may need a brilliant financial advisor who would give you honest advice in your money matters.

3.name: The High Priestess
3.love: Things are changing in your personal life. The heart shall rule over the mind. The temptation of a certain relationship would be too difficult to resist. Your love interest may play hard to get. A chance meeting may turn into a close affair too soon. Be wise to tread with caution and awareness. You may be confused regarding the status of a particular relationship. Try to get a clearer picture by changing your perspective. You may have to wait for some time till the picture is clearer.Search for inner peace will draw you to new relations. Love never seemed so magical before. New emotions will be stirred. You will find yourself being attracted to someone who will deliberately stay aloof from you. Alternatively, you may have many suitors ready to woo you. Someone very wise and knowledgeable may offer you some sound advice. Pay heed to his counsel. In case you are facing some troubles in your love life, it would be sensible to dig deeper and understand the root cause of the issue. Things may not really be as they seem to you; appearances can be deceptive. It would be wiser to wait for the clouds to clear before committing to something deeper and precious.
3.career: Pressure at work and office politics may make you feel frustrated and exhausted. Be careful; do not let these issues be a cause of any blunder or inefficiency in your tasks. Dont be misguided by those around you; listen to your own intuitions. Be prepared to take on additional work or responsibilities beyond your usual domain. It may prove to be a turning point in your career.  Late nights and insufficient rest may prove hurdles for students. You may find it difficult to concentrate on your studies. You are advised to put in extra efforts to improve your grades.Time is ripe for a change in career. New job opportunities may present themselves. Businessmen can get new clients or may be offered new projects. Do not take anything on its face value; research thoroughly before making any commitments. Rely on your own gut feeling and be prepared for pleasant surprises. Working with a team may seem problematic for you. It would do you good to ignore the smaller issues and focus on larger, common goals.Do not be drawn to rumours or office politics. Trivial matters may flare up emotions and sparks may fly. It is prudent to isolate yourself from this kind of explosive atmosphere. Those in creative fields will have a very inspiring and fruitful day.
3.finance: Things are under wraps right now; it will take some time before the reality is comes to light. Many alluring money making schemes will attract your attention. Collect all the necessary information and details before putting your money in new ventures. Do not be gullible: be cautious and learn to exercise good judgment in financial dealings. Wait for some more time before investing in a new venture or making new investments. Be patient and avoid taking rash decisions or hurried actions.It would be wiser to rely on your instincts and your self-knowledge, rather than your intellect mind while resolving a financial issue. Your heightened intuitive powers will help you take the right decisions. This is the appropriate time to reassess your financial standing and balance your incomes and expenditures. There is a possibility of receiving some unexpected money. Reveal only what is necessary. Keep all communication lines open. You can use some new information for your benefit. Read and understand the full implications of even the small prints before signing any document. Listen to your conscious and trust your inner voice when in confusion. Beware, someone may try to deceive you or take undue advantage of your generosity.

4.name: The Empress
4.love: You may meet someone very interesting; though it may take some time for closeness to develop. Those already in a relationship shall enjoy an excited and passionate bonding with their partner. This is the perfect time to open up, to experience new things, to cuddle with your loved ones. The married may make plans to start a family in the near future. Closeness with family members will give you a very warm and comforting feeling.If in a new relationship, it would be wise to woo your love in a gradual romantic manner. Focus your attention and energies on relationships you wish to see growing. Your charming manners are sure to attract many admirers. You shall feel emotionally close to someone special who will be very understanding and tender towards you. This will give you a very comforting and satisfying feeling. You can revel in the aura of bliss and beauty around you. You shall share a strong sense of mutual affection and appreciation with your partner. You shall be happy and content with the simple joys and the closeness that your relationships have to offer. Those planning a family may get some encouraging news.  As a mother, you would feel very caring and compassionate about your children.
4.career: This is a good period for initiating creative projects.  Your creativity can be channelized towards conceptualizing. This is the appropriate time to show your efforts and energies. Students may be disturbed by some personal or family issues and this will reflect adversely on their studies. You will have to reflect seriously on getting your priorities right and concentrate your attention on getting higher grades, especially when exams are around the corner.  The day is ideal to work from home where you can utilize your time for making plans and formulating strategies. You will come up with new ideas and theories. Taking actions and decisions can wait. You are geared up to take on any challenge that comes your way. Help and encouragement will be forthcoming from seniors and colleagues alike. Your perseverance and efforts will pay off; you may be considered for a promotion. You shall be successful in creative ventures. People will look up to you for guidance and inspiration. Business will run smoothly and gradually. You shall be able to win the confidence of new clients or customers based on your past performances. If in a new venture, you are advised to wait and watch. Students should take care not to be disheartened by the undesirable happenings around.
4.finance: Follow your instincts in case you are interested in making new investments. You will love to share your gains and increments with your near and dear ones. This is a time to spend and splurge. The most important thing is to remain optimistic and confident about your future. All your worries regarding your monetary issues will now come to an end. The spotlight now is on your money matters. You shall be able to attain financial success in a short period of time by excelling at whatever you do and  optimally using your skills and abilities. Finances will start flowing in. This is an excellent time to invest in new ventures. Do not hesitate to seek professional help and advice in this matter.  Investment in real estate will prove profitable. A new source of income may open up. Freelancers may have a hay day which will augment their earnings. Entrepreneurs should be judicious in their spending. Women may be tempted to splurge on cosmetics, designer wear, kitty parties, etc.  However practice restrain while shopping; otherwise you may end up buying many things which you may actually never need or use later. Outstanding revenues may take some more time to come.

5.name: The Emperor
5.love: Expect some solid action and stability in your relationships. Your love relations will continue to flourish. It is you who shall take the lead in your romantic endeavors. You will feel blessed to be surrounded by love, care, and appreciation. Your partner adores you. Time is perfect to for a reunion with your family and friends. Your extended family would join in the celebration. Mind will tend to rule over the matters of the heart. You are likely to get in touch with someone you love & admire. You may find yourself irresistibly drawn towards someone older who is more organized, more efficient and more authoritative than you. You are likely to be swept by the surge of passion and shall be able to express your desires in the most explicit ways. A concrete plan for dating will prove very successful now. It is an excellent period for the eligible ones waiting to tie the knot. Efforts to stabilize relationships shall bear fruits. You shall feel more connected and in sync with your partner. You shall strive to know each other more deeply and intimately. Commitment will come easily to you.
5.career: This is a period of excellent and positive opportunities. Success and achievements are on their way. You will be blessed with good luck and happiness. Let your creative side come to the forefront.  You are in no mood to take orders; you will set down your own rules. You may get an opportunity to advance your education. You may learn new skills to improve your work productivity and output. Those looking for a job may find a suitable one. Do not be disheartened by the initial glitches at the work place. This is a good day to achieve your professional goals. An influential person will offer support and encouragement. You are likely to initiate a new course of action which will harmonize your ideals with your target. You shall confidently maneuver your way forward to accomplish your objectives. Some difficult choices will have to be made – which shall not be much of a problem to you given the strength of your determination and your wisdom. You may have to take some conclusive decisions regarding your professional life. It would be wise to refrain from imposing your views on others. Do not be too bossy or authoritative with your subordinates.
5.finance: An elderly experienced person will provide you the much needed prudent advice and guidance. Businessmen shall be motivated to expand their business and clientele and shall gain considerably. Surplus profits and gains will give your more confidence to implement your long pending strategies. You might now shift your finances to an aggressive marketing campaign of your products and may try to make a mark on the international market.Freelancers are likely to be able to generate more income with their creative financial skills. You would be able to handle and manage money well with your common sense and practical approach. A wise and disciplined approach in spending will help to augment your savings. Do not be too stingy with yourself. You may allow yourself the luxury of some personal shopping.  This is the right time to take stock of your financial records and work towards balancing the accounts. You can come up with ingenious ways to cut costs and increase earnings.  Income and wealth will increase. Keep a check on extravagant spending. It would be prudent to capitalize your accumulated savings in an investment which is likely to yield a good rate of return.

6.name: The Hierophant
6.love: You shall be able to spend some quality time with your family members and close acquaintances. The unattached will come across someone interesting and life will become more pleasant. You shall find yourself overwhelmingly drawn towards this person. You may feel a great desire to share, offer and accept love.  Members of opposite sex will be attracted to you by your hypnotic charm. You shall relish the cordial relations you enjoy with your friends and close social groups. A relationship which began with casual love and sexual attraction may lead to the beginning of a serious and deeper bonding. Someone whom you have known from quite some time and who has been your ardent admirer will gather courage to propose you. Alternatively, you may profess your love to someone. Listen to the voice of your heart while taking crucial decisions regarding your personal relationships. Marriage will be in your mind. The blessings of senior members in the family will boost your confidence to go ahead with your plans. You shall be able to spend some happy moments with your loved ones. You shall bask in the reassurance, warmth and affection of near and dear ones.
6.career: Students may join a new course or institution. They shall get a chance to broaden their knowledge and skills under the supervision of an efficient coach. It would be wise to stay focused on the tasks you are allotted. You may have an argument with your boss or someone in a superior position. Fulfilling your responsibility in tangible ways would help ensure a positive result. This is a good time to get involved in group projects.You shall zealously aspire to progress quickly on your career path. Your over-enthusiasm and dynamism may actually irk those around you. Additional skills and aptitudes will earn you appreciation and even a promotion. You may be transferred to a new location or department in connection with your work where you shall meet new people and get a chance to learn new work techniques from them. You may face emergency at work place and may have to make some adjustments. Conforming to newer methods could be frustrating for you. But you shall be fortunate to find someone who will steer you through the trying times. You may even decide to take up further studies, go in for post-graduation or a Diploma course which will help enhance your job prospects. An experienced person will appear to mentor and guide you.
6.finance: You shall be more worried now about the future of your financial status more than ever. Quickly depleting monetary resources shall be the cause of concern. However, you need not panic over this issue as this is but a passing phase. Delays will happen but positive results will eventually show up. You may resort to conventional means of managing and saving money. Investments in stable and low-risk assets would yield decent returns. It is time for you to refocus on strengthening your financial position in a determined way. You may not feel very comfortable with your current status on the financial front. Consequently, you might start looking out for new ways and means to enhance your financial prospects. You will have to remain cautious and vigilant while dealing with financial matters. Household expenses may increase. You may need to provide for unforeseen sudden overheads. It is advisable to refrain from reckless spending or indulging in unethical ways of earning money. It would be wise to seek the help of financial experts before making any new investments. Also, glance through the new financial schemes and read market trend reports to keep abreast of the changing fiscal developments.

7.name: The Lovers
7.love: The single and eligible have a good chance of finding a new love. This may be the first serious relationship of your life. Someone charismatic will sweep you off your feet with his/her appealing manners and sweet, soothing words of affection.  Your mind will take you beyond the realms of materialism to the sphere of an authentic passions and sensitivities. The love of your life is waiting to be found; he is closer to you than you had imagined. You may meet someone very interesting and may be attracted to him instantly. A new relationship is in the offing.  It would not be possible to keep the love birds away from each other. This is an ideal time to bask in the comforting feeling of being loved so passionately and amorously. Everything is pleasant and joyful for those already in a relationship. You both have long been studying and analyzing each other; now you may decide to take your romance to the next level.  It is also a good time to re-assess a troublesome relationship. You may find that the chemistry and attraction still exists between you two and can decide to give your love another chance.
7.career: Do not let your emotions cloud your judgments and decisions. Adversities and impediments may bother you in your professional life, but be assured the problems are not as grave as they seem to be. Your partner may be of great help to you professionally too; he may introduce you to a new contact or opportunity. Students are likely to lack the enthusiasm and motivation to study. They need to guard against being drifted into the alluring world of dreams. If you have been thinking about a career change then now is the time to do it. You may get an offer of a dream job. This is the time to harmonize your relationships at work place and ease out tensions, if any. Focus on constructive communication. Creating harmony is the keyword to success. Some associations may not seem to work initially; but have faith; things will work out just right for all. Stay calm and continue with your efforts. It is very vital that you stay focused on your work and career with full commitment. Conversations will like-minded people will be rewarding. A client may come forward with a new deal. Partnerships will work out fine for you. Proceed with your innovative schemes with diligence and persistence.
7.finance: The inflow and outgoings of cash will remain balanced. Actually, there is not much to worry about on the financial front. You shall benefit from real estate deals and investments. Keep track of your finances and control the urge to splurge money. You may spend on things which you may not use later. You are at a crucial stage where you need to take an important financial decision that can have long lasting implications.  Income is good; but expenses just refuse to be controlled, despite your persistent efforts. You may have to spend on your social obligations and entertainment. Wasteful expenditures too may reduce your monetary resources. It is very important to sort out your financial affairs now; decide where should you invest your saving and how much.  Part timers and freelancers shall be able to supplement their income by putting in extra hours of work. You may come up with innovative ideas to increase your earnings. If you are running your own business, your financial status is not likely to be quite steady. You should create reserve funds for sudden contingencies in your business. It would be wise to cut down insignificant overheads and postpone any new changes for the present.

8.name: The Chariot
8.love: Listen to the voice of your heart to make the right choices in a relationship.  You may realize the value and significance of your relationship with someone. It is a good day to take the first step to reconcile your differences and make a new start. Work commitments and deadlines may keep you busy and you may be hard-pressed to spend some quiet moments with your dear ones. This is a peculiar time when both past and future would catch up in the present. You may meet some old friend after ages. A new person may enter your life; bringing with him new positivity which will inspire you and help you to be a better and more knowledgeable person. The company of interesting people will fill you with optimistic thoughts. You are likely to share a deep and satisfying bonding with your spouse.  It is time to re-evaluate your relationships and if necessary, get some fresh air in it. Planning an outing for just the two of you could well be a new beginning. Constant and honest communications would be very helpful here. If confused, you find the answers to most of your problems through self-examination and contemplation.
8.career: You are likely to receive some good news. You might be offered some type of internship that will allow you to be trained under an excellent mentor. Your drive and intuition shall be at their peak. You shall have the requisite determination and resilience needed to overcome all hurdles and march your way to success. Businessmen can experiment with new strategies with success. You may have to undertake some work related journeys. Your job application may get a positive response and you may be called for an interview.  You can now move forward to realize your ambitions. Be assured you shall get all the cooperation and assistance you need. Concentrate on your goals; don’t be distracted or disheartened by the obstacles on the way. If you are thinking of starting your own venture, then this is the time to pitch in all the available resources and your efforts. The Universe will connive to help you realize your dreams fruitfully. Do not forget to help and thank those who were a part of your success journey. You can make a lot of progress now, defeating challenges and solving problems that may have held you back in the past. You may have to travel for business or work related purposes.
8.finance: This period will be encouraging for you from financial and business point of view. At this point of time, you are very clear about what you want in life and are ready to put in your best efforts towards achieving your goals. You are likely to be lucky in all kinds of speculative activities; it could be the stock markets, lotteries, casinos or raffle games. Monetary situation will be comfortable enough to allow you some personal spending. The your current resources  are enough to cover up all your needs and comforts. There should be no cause to worry; but this is not the case. Despite having a comfortable financial status, you shall be distressed and anxious to earn more money. It would, in fact, be wiser to control your expenses; especially on luxurious items. All you need to do now is to prioritize all your monetary requirements. Concentrate on new ways of saving and investing money. Businessmen too may face cash crunch. Long standing debtors may be slow in repaying their outstanding dues.  A good inflow of money will increase your bank balance. You may make some new purchases. It is not a very good time to think of new investments.

9.name: Strength
9.love: Some issues of your distant past may disturb you. You will finally realize that there is nothing you can do about it now.  People around you may come up with varying solutions and suggestions. But at this point of time, it is necessary that you trust your own intuitions and go by your own judgments. It is time to gather strength and move on in life. You will now have to realize that the past is over. A new relationship is waiting to happen. You may meet someone who is contrasting to you in nature. You may refrain from speaking your mind to a loved one or potential partner; this may create confusion. It is wiser to be frank and straightforward in matters of the heart. If you are already in a relationship, odds are that some trouble is brewing between you two. Harsh speech can create rift with spouse. Maintain a control over your temper and words; do not let your emotions get the better of you.  If necessary, try to share your pent-up feelings with someone close whom you can confide in and who will not be judgmental about you.
9.career: You are likely to be at that juncture of life where many possibilities will open up before you. Some radical changes are possible on the work front. Persistent efforts and pragmatic strategies will help tide over the glitches. You shall be successful in handling problematic clients and obstinate coworkers. This is the time to prove your mettle at work. You may be allotted a difficult task or project to complete within a set timeline. Do not be deterred by the magnitude or complexity of the work. Once you succeed in completing it satisfactorily, not only will you gain a new experience; but you shall be able to gain much respect as well as monetary benefits.  Try not to be obstinate and do give an ear to the advice people may give. Your confidence and aloofness may be misunderstood as your haughtiness and arrogance. Do not attempt to turn the tide; rather flow with it. Awaken the strength and willpower to push through adversities and achieve your goals. Success will be yours. While you enjoy the fruits of your success, try to be easygoing and sympathetic toward others.  Time is not very encouraging for businessmen; they may have to face some hitches in the course of their dealings and trade.  Do not worry; this is just a passing phase.
9.finance: Luck is on your side with regard to financial matters. Your economic status will improve. Income and savings both will increase gradually. Cash shall flow in unhindered. The focus now will be satiating your own personal needs and pleasures. You may be inspired to try something you've never tried before; your confidence will soar.  A big investment is likely to pay off or for the long awaited raise or a job offer is finally going to happen. Financial opportunities will open up in many different ways and through many different channels. You may sign a major contract which will give you a feeling of immense happiness and fulfillment. You may expect money from unexpected quarters; you may win a lottery. Gains through an inheritance or ancestral property are also likely. There could be a strong temptation to spend lavishly on frivolous things that are not really needed. It would be wise to invest in long term assets like property, etc. You may also opt to utilize the money for humanitarian purposes, especially charities and other good causes. Businessmen may get lucrative offers for expansion of their trades.

10.name: The Hermit
10.love: You may be overwhelmed by the feeling of loneliness. You may feel that you are absolutely alone with no one to share your feelings with. Do not despair. This is the time to delve into the matters of the heart and try to understand what exactly the problem is. A fresh start is waiting to happen in your personal relationships. Do not hesitate to accept the change; it will set matter right in the end. You shall get the emotional security you are looking for. Your partner may seem elusive in this period. You, too, may not be in a mood to spend time together. You may turn very sensitive and vulnerable at the moment. Withdrawing into silence or distancing yourself is not the solution. You need to give yourself some time for self-introspection. You may have to assess your relationship and understand the issues which are creating problems or differences between you two. You may decide to take a break from your love life and engage yourself in something which you love to do – for your own self. The married too may benefit from some soul searching and analyzing their relationship from a different perspective.
10.career: You will get an opportunity to move away from routine work and concentrate on a project which requires much reflection and scrutiny. You shall prove to be a good team leader which would be helpful in improving your professional relationships. Those looking for a job need to first be sure of what they really want to do. Don’t hesitate to seek counseling to make the right choice. Those who are appearing for competitive exams or job interviews would do well and be successful. You will get ample opportunities to promote yourself and your talents at work. You may get involved in team discussions. There may be a situation where many options exist and it would be difficult to choose the most appropriate and practical one.  It is not a time to rush into making decisions; face the facts, ponder, analyze – the solutions will reveal themselves. You shall be able to re-evaluate your personal goals and if necessary, introduce changes in your priorities or strategies. You can use your enhanced imagination and enthusiasm in creative and constructive work. Stress and work pressure may have an adverse impact on health. It’s time to relax and unwind.
10.finance: Financial position may not be very satisfactory now. Sudden, unexpected expenses will disrupt your budget. Outstanding income will take time to come. Some extra efforts and simple gestures like cutting down not-so-urgent spending or postponing some purchases may help you tide over the fiscal crunch. You may decide to become more responsible and make serious efforts to curb your extravagant and impulsive spending habits.You may need to pause and seriously reflect on your current financial situation. Despite new income opportunities coming up, economic strain shall prevail. There could be some practical difficulties and some wasteful expenses in this period. It is time to take charge of your financial situation now. Working overtime or taking on additional jobs may improve your finances. Insecurity may in fact push you to be more enthusiastic and come up with new money making ideas and schemes. Time is not appropriate for making new investments or for expanding your business. Keep away from gambling and speculations. Stall your development plans for some time. It would be wise to maintain a status quo position in money matters. A partner may offer to invest additional capital in the business.

11.name: Wheel of Fortune
11.love: Your relationship may be going through a rough patch. It’s time to pause and take a stock of your feelings and expectations. There may be no issue between you two after all. It could just be some external factors which are affecting your personal equations. It would be wise to have a heart-to-heart talk with each other and clear out your misunderstandings rather than sulking silently. This is the period to reconnect with your dear ones who are far away. Guests may arrive at home and lighten up the domestic atmosphere. Some childhood friend will meet you after a long time, bringing back sweet memories and a smile on your face. A close friend may need your guidance . An ex-lover or mate will try to come back to your life. You should take some time to ponder and decide whether you want to give your relationship a second chance or walk away from it. At such time, your family will prove to be a solid pillar of strength and support for you. You may befriend a new person. This may later bloom into a serious relationship.
11.career: You are likely to experience some sudden, pleasant changes.  You have strong will power and spirit. You shall be able to solve problems with your abilities and the willingness to use all resources you have at your disposal.  The wheel of luck will spin in your favor. This is the best time to advance professionally. It is a very good period to start a new trade or venture. The winds of change have begun to blow. New career options may open up. Those already in a relationship shall make some plans to spend more quality time together; the married may decide to go on a world trip for a second honeymoon. Your partner will be very extravagant and indulgent towards you. Time is favorable for you to plan a baby and start a family.
22.career: You are likely to feel confident, self-reliant and raring to go. You shall aim to reach the skies. Have faith in yourself; you can achieve great things. You have succeeded in overcoming all the hurdles. Your deep commitment to work and ability to optimize your skills will help you to realize things others can only dream of. You may learn a new skill or engage in activities which make you feel complete. Time is ripe to ask for a promotion to a more challenging role or position.Fresh graduates may be offered a job in State run departments or in companies abroad. You shall be able to use your overflowing enthusiasm to constructive advance towards fulfillment of your goals. You had invested a lot of efforts and energy in a project; it has now come to its successful completion. You can now relax and wait to enjoy the fruits of achievement. Do not regret the uncompensated remuneration or appreciation. You have already proved your mettle to others. The difficulties and hurdles you faced in the course of your work shall serve to prepare you for bigger things. You can now start planning on the next move or the next project.
22.finance: Exciting and interesting changes are at work. Financial standing will improve. Money will flow in easily. Income will come in from more than one source. Your excellent organizational skills would make budgeting easy for you and you would manage to save enough for a rainy day. Time is appropriate to systematically get all your financial dealings in order. Those in teaching or consulting professions may get an offer to go abroad. The hurdles in gaining profits will now be cleared. This period holds promise of quite incredible financial rewards. Money will start flowing in. But this should not be a reason to splurge. It is time to save and invest wisely. Minor financial losses may occur; but you would soon be able to cover for them with the rise in incomes. You shall be able to successfully sell your business ideas to investors. There are chances of striking a business partnership with a friend or a relative – someone who you know well. You may also benefit by expanding into new areas or lines of business. Supplementary educational degrees/certifications or experience may help you to advance in your career and gain substantial monetary benefits.

23.name: Ace of Wands
23.love: It is a positive time for relationships. A new romance can change your life forever. You are likely to meet a person who will sweep you off your feet. You shall be able to relish the delightful feeling of first love. You may ask a special friend out for a date and even propose to her/him. Those already in love may be pleasantly surprised to discover a new aspect of their beloved. If you have been facing some troubles in your relationships, now is the time to make amends. Have a heart to heart talk with each other; you may realize that there is still lots of mutual feelings and affection left. You may decide to fall in love with each other once again! This time round, your feelings for each other shall be more meaningful and profound. You may decide to advance to the next step; may be get engaged or married. Passions and sensual cravings would be heightened. The flush and excitement of love would find expression in mutual attractions. You may plan a wild and exciting vacation with your spouse. Your seductive demeanors are sure to charm your partner. This is a very productive time for you, pun intended! Married couples may seriously consider having a baby.
23.career: This is the right time to make auspicious beginnings and expand your horizons. You are full of energy and self-confidence and are optimally motivated to take on new challenges and realize your dreams. You have delved long on the schemes and plans; now is the time to take concrete action. You are all set for a new turn in your work life. You shall now be able to achieve what your mind conceives.You may get a new job or may decide to change over to a new profession altogether. You may be promoted to a more responsible and exciting position where you shall get chances to optimize your latent talents. Innovative ideas will give a competitive edge to your projects. Some of you may even consider shifting abroad or to a new place for better career prospects. Businessmen may have a strong urge to start something different and exciting. Entrepreneurs with new creative ideas shall find golden opportunities to successfully execute them. This is also a good time to revamp your marketing strategy. You may also resort to new technology to further your production and business. Do not let delays and false fears deter you from your path.
23.finance: New opportunities shall present themselves paving way for improved finances. A new job, a new venture, new investments – all shall make a positive mark on your fiscal status. You may move to a more rewarding employment or start a project which will yield good returns on completion. Those in the creative fields shall benefit the most. You shall receive some very encouraging news relating to money. There could be a sudden spurt in your finances. You may get an increase in salary or a big bonus may be announced. Unexpected monetary gains in the form of a lottery prize or inheritance may come as a surprise to you. You may even win an all-expenses paid foreign trip. You may turn your hobby into a money earning vocation. You are very likely to earn a good fortune by making wise investments. You will earn a lot and spend a lot too. You can now afford to make large purchases and fulfill your long desired wishes. You need to manage your newly found wealth well. It would be prudent to diversify your investment portfolio. You can use the extra cash to invest in your dream project. Judicious planning will help you keep your finances secure.

24.name: Two of Wands
24.love: Things are not very clear on the relationship front. You may be facing some frustrating dilemmas. You may want to propose to your love interest, but may not be very sure about it. Those already in a relationship may be confused as to where exactly is their alliance heading. Your partner may be behaving very detached and standoffish since some time now. Some of you may have to face the shocking fact of your beloved walking out of a seemingly strong and long relationship. You may be left figuring out what exactly went wrong between you two. Alternatively, it may be you who is attracted to someone new who is very jovial and lively as compared to your current sober, restrained but loving companion. You may be equally attracted towards both; but will have to make a choice, howsoever difficult it may be.The committed or the married may receive a good lucrative offer to settle abroad. They may find themselves in a fix – having to choose between loving relations and a fulfilling career and future. They will have to decide what is of prime importance to them.  It would be best to keep away from power play in your relationship.
24.career: This is a period of changes; of making choices. You may find yourself at the crossroads of your professional life. On one hand, you have a secure and successful career with everything going your way; and on the other hand, you have this restless urge to follow your passion. You are eager to take on new challenges, expand your horizons and create a niche for yourself. You know the new path is unknown and that you are inexperienced; yet the call is strong.  Your logic and practical approach pulls you in one direction while your instincts pull you in the other; a choice has to be made – and soon. You are ready to focus all your energies and resources to progress on the new path. This could mean chucking a secured job and seeking new placements and moving abroad for work, venturing into near arenas. You may take on new leadership roles and mentor new talents. Businessmen may be waiting for the right time or opportunity to embark on a new undertaking or venture into international market.  They may pause to rethink and reflect on the likely consequences. The self-employed shall be very excited to implement their ideas. The path is full of struggles but your energy and passion will surely see you through.
24.finance: Financially, things are looking up. You are likely to get some encouraging news relating to money or livelihood. You may get an offer of a lucrative job. Those looking for a change in work will be able to find a more rewarding alternative. You can even try seeking employment in a different department of the same organization. The employed can expect an increment in salary or an unexpected perk. Do not hesitate to ask for what you think you rightfully deserve – you may actually get it – with full honors. Businessmen may venture into new territories with enthusiasm and confidence. Those in travels and tour or in overseas trading businesses shall benefit a lot. Monetary status will be steadily abundant. Incomes shall exceed the outgoings and you will have enough remaining to enjoy and have fun. Making choices could be a daunting task. You may have to choose between spending and saving; between buying some things of personal comfort and satisfaction and investing in a long term asset which promises good returns. You may have to decide as to where should you invest your additional cash. You may decide to opt only for secured investments. Profits may take some time to materialize.

25.name: Three of Wands
25.love: This period may see you taking some important decisions regarding your relationships.  A casual friendship may have slowly bloomed into a serious attraction and affection for the concerned person. Your priorities would change and you are now ready to declare your love; but may be a little apprehensive about what to say and how to put your feelings across. The newlyweds may have settled down in their marital life; they have overcome the initial glitches of a family life and are now assured of a bright and promising future. The married couples may decide it is time to start planning for a baby. Those in a bad relationship may think it wise to end the alliance for good. You will decide to put your painful, broken affair behind you and start afresh. You may meet someone interesting from a different background or a different culture. You would like to be cautious this time around and would take some time contemplating things before moving ahead. You may consider spending more time with your beau in a bid to understand each other well and make your relationship more meaningful. You may decide to go on a trip to foreign locales or even migrate abroad.
25.career: This period indicates a lot of movement and momentum in your professional life. It may mean a fresh start in career or a new undertaking. Those who were out of work or unemployed till now, will find a suitable employment which will alter their lives. The chances of having to travel abroad for work are bright. Those already in a job, may get promoted and posted to an overseas location. You are very eager to put your enthusiastic and creative ideas at work. You shall feel very confident and assured of your plans and projects. You shall be full of renewed vigor and motivation to put in your best efforts and accomplish your goals. This will pave way to success and prosperity. You can take the liberty of being proud of your efforts and achievements. You may decide to venture into a business of your own. The beginning may be slow and testing; but eventually you shall be successful in your endeavors. Patience and perseverance would be much needed and would finally pay off well. You may get some encouraging news related to your professional life. Overseas contacts and clients will increase business and profits. An influential person with a good financial standing and credibility would be interested in financing your business. This could be the beginning of a long term successful partnership.
25.finance: You are putting in all your efforts and resources into your work. It will not be long before you are handsomely rewarded for these exertions. Projects are nearing completion and shall yield good profits. The much awaited promotion may now come through. Finances are going to improve substantially, compensating your perseverance in more ways than you expected. You shall now be able to fulfill many of your wishes and desires; spending the way you like, without having to think much about the consequences. You shall see a major opulent change in your lifestyle. You shall come across plenty of opportunities and channels to augment your income. Any money stuck somewhere will now be forthcoming.  You shall be able to recover your old debts. You shall be able to write off all your financial tensions and look forward for a happier and a fulfilling future. It is recommended that you save some amounts for future contingencies and investments. A wise investment can prove to be a lifelong financial security. Remember it took you a long time and lots of efforts to reach this level of financial affluence; capitalize it wisely consult some financial experts if needed. Sharing a portion of your money with the less privileged will only add to your joy and contentment.

26.name: Four of Wands
26.love: This is going to be an eventful period so far as love and romance is concerned. Cupid is soon to strike the singles and the eligible.  Close friendships may blossom into a serious and lasting love affair. You may propose to your sweetheart or declare your love to the world. Family members will approve of your choice.  It is a great time for you to make some serious relationship decisions or take your relationship to a new level. Being settled down in a serious alliance will give you a very comforting and soothing feeling. Happy moments and celebrations will rule the day. You will find yourself in a relationship you always dreamt of. The romantic and emotional moods will keep you blissful and contented.  Passions will be heightened and spirits will burn bright. This is the time to have fun and rejoice.  You shall be pleasantly enjoying get-togethers, family parties dinner meet ups, etc. and relishing all the attention you get. You may decide to get engaged or married and the whole group of family and friends will get busy in the festive preparations. You may start planning to set up a house and even start a family.
26.career: This period could prove to be a crucial turning point in your professional life bringing in abundance and contentment. Those who have completed graduation and are looking out for an employment shall find a job of their liking and choice. The work environment of your office will be quite reassuring and cheerful – much to your taste. Colleagues and seniors shall be very supportive. The interns shall complete their training schedules and assignments successfully and may be confirmed as a full time permanent employee of the firm. Those working on prestigious and important projects shall be able to complete it satisfactorily. Some of you may be promoted to a new job or to a foreign location.You shall more than achieve your set targets. The self-employed may successfully launch a home based venture and find new clients almost instantly. This is the right time for businessmen to analyze their stupendous progress and pat their own backs and also thank and reward those who have helped make this possible. Entrepreneurs are likely to be rewarded, praised and honored for their initiative and creativity in the corporate world. You may also be nominated for some prestigious award.
26.finance: This is a financially rewarding period for you. You have been working hard since quite some time; now is the time to reap the fruits of your persistent labors. You shall be able to enjoy the rewards of your efforts in a big and extravagant way. You can expect some good news regarding incomes. The employed can expect a rise in their salary or a bonus. Freelancers and self-employed will have a field day. Business can expect additional earnings in form of dividends or profits from long term securities. Investments in bonds, mutual funds and other speculative stocks would attract good returns. With some extra cash in your hands, you can go in for some indulgent shopping or make some large purchases. Remember that you have earned this money by your own efforts and grit; do not waste it on unnecessary spending.  Since your monetary status will be very stable and comfortable, it is time to clear all your pending dues and debts and invest prudently for the future. You will have enough cash to move ahead with your pending plans. A money-making concept may very well be converted into a golden opportunity or business.

27.name: Five of Wands
27.love: Problems are likely to disturb your personal relationships. This might prove to be a testing time for those in love. You may feel ignored or neglected. You may have an inkling of a third person entering into and disturbing your equation with your mate. A feeling of jealousy or competitiveness may quietly creep in your relationship. Having invested a lot many things into your relationship has raised your expectations from it. You have changed yourself and your attitude to be closer to your beloved. The recent sudden turn of events may have confused you. all you need is a reassurance that you are loved and valued as before or even more. It would be wise to keep away from arguments and comparisons. There is no point fighting about who is a better partner or lover in the alliance. You both actually love each other lot and your relationship has withstood a lot of struggles and difficulties. You may have to devote some more time and energy in strengthening your relationship. Try to compensate your partner’s weaknesses by your own strengths. Those who are new in a relationship need to be more patient and accommodating in their approach.
27.career: Things are going to be very tough on the career front. Nevertheless, you are all charged up for action with your adrenaline running high.  Your optimism is heightened and you are ready to welcome even blockages in work as opportunities to prove your grit. You are in a truly competitive and combative mood now. Your enthusiasm and winning streak may not be taken kindly by all. An opponent or a group in the workplace may be conspiring against you. Of course, there shall be oppositions and disruptions; but they shall not be able to deter you from giving a befitting fight to the finish and emerge as a winner. You are likely to be caught up in the crossfire of power pulls. Disagreements with superiors and colleagues are likely to take an ugly turn. Petty hassles will annoy you. Ignore them and move ahead with your perseverance and plans. Maintain your cool and patience. Keep on the right and honest path. Businessmen will come up with inspiring innovative ideas to improve their business. Those in sports need to be very careful; you may be hurt, bruised or wounded; but that should not daunt you from playing better. Do not hesitate to stand up for what you believe to be true, important and principled.
27.finance: You need to be careful in all matters relating to money. Lack of planning and carelessness in business dealings may prove to be fatal. Misleading and incomplete information can result in financial losses and wrong investments. Be scrupulous and clear in your transactions. Think cautiously before taking any important decision. Consult a financial expert while taking any important resolution regarding finances. Try to keep a tight rein on your unessential spending and try to conserve as much cash as possible. If you are waiting for some payments, it may take some more time. Business may have to face some commercial losses. Expenditures may rise, debts may turn bad, orders may be cancelled, and so on. Keep your accounts and books up to date; let there be no room for any wrongdoing or inaccuracy.  It would be prudent to verify the credentials of your clients and partners before initiating any business deal with them.  Safeguard you monetary reserves. Avoid borrowing money from the bank or any other financial institution. Analyze carefully the future benefits before investing in an asset. You do not need to panic much as this is a passing phase. If you remain grounded and focused, you will have nothing to lose.

28.name: Six of Wands
28.love: New relationships shall be formed; old relationships will improve for the better. The unattached will find their dream man or woman very much in their vicinity. You shall fall head over heels in love with this person. If you have been secretly admiring someone, your feelings shall be more than reciprocated. On the whole, you can expect your romantic life to be full of happiness, pleasure and fun filled excitement. All disagreements shall be amicably resolved.Couples will have a very fulfilling passionate time. You both shall be able to work together towards achieving common goals with connected ideas and double the enthusiasm. This will take your relationship to a new pinnacle filled with abundant energy and warmth. You will get to know some new unearthed secrets about your partner that will pleasantly surprise you. An auspicious occasion or celebration in the family will be a good reason to bring all the family members – extended family and friends included – together after a long time. You may decide to take your love interest home to be introduced to your people. The birth of a child may be announced spreading love and cheerfulness around.
28.career: You have proved your organizational and leadership skills and have emerged a winner. Now is the time to move in the limelight and hear the music of the applause. Let the whole world know what you have been successful at and how. Appreciations, recognitions, awards and laurels – all come your way. This stupendous success gives you the confidence to face any upcoming challenges and trials. Beware and do not let this exhilaration make you egoistic. You can now move ahead in your career with intensified vigor and enthusiasm. Luck is in your working; get the most out of it. Keep working on your projects and dreams. You will now have to plan bigger and achieve more. You will now need to put a lot more effort into work if you wish your success spree to continue. Some results may take some more time to come by. Be patient and keep trying even if things are not working at the pace they should. Try to sweet talk and inspire your juniors to put in their maximum efforts and cooperate with you in the achievement of your goals. This is also the time to take well-deserved and well-earned holidays.
28.finance: If you have been facing any financial problems lately, you can heave a sigh of relief now. Whatever you do, will bring you good returns. Those in employment can gain financially through promotions and increments. The unemployed may get a lucrative job offer. Your talents and aptitudes will play a major role in enhancing your financial status. You can also expect to receive additional revenue through tours and travels embark upon during this period. Those engaged in artistic and creative activities shall see a rewarding period. Overseas contacts will bring business and profits. Luck favors businessmen in their financial deals. Be wary of borrowing or lending money from anyone. Your newly started venture may attract investors or new partners. With the copious flow of cash, it is but natural that some people may try to befriend you with the intention of taking advantage of you. It would not be wrong to be a little self-centered and spend some money on enhancing your own personality or buying luxury items for your own self. You may also spend on home improvements. At the same time, use prudence and expert advice to invest your hard earned money in secure and viable investments.

29.name: Seven of Wands
29.love: Relationships can be very suffocating now. A state of confusion shall prevail. You have made your share of compromises and adjustments; but are in no mood to continue to do so. Emotionally, you may feel much drained. You may not know where your relationship is heading.  You no longer want to keep drifting in uncertainty. Now is the time to take a stand on your status in the alliance.  Do not be afraid to speak out your mind and to seek clear answers. You may take a very important decision which may change the very course of your relationship. The singles may meet someone very charming while on a tour or in the course of travelling. They may have to put efforts to outdo their competitors who too are vying to get the attention of their love interest. He or she may be very popular and sought after by the opposite sex. Some changes in the equations of relationships are foreseen. It could be an engagement or marriage or even the birth of a child. It is definitely good news; but the change of role and increase in responsibilities may bring in their own share of qualms and uncertainties.
29.career: This is the time of progressing and achieving; of using all the resources at your disposal to realize your goals. Your ambitions shall be at their peak and you are ready to do whatever it takes to reach the peak. Your strong intention to succeed will help you overcome all the hurdles on your path. Challenges and competitions shall seem thrilling and motivating. You are ready to dedicate your best even in the face of adversity. Whether it is a job interview or presentation of a business proposal, your strong resolution and confidence will see you emerge a triumphant winner all the way. Professional life will be very hectic. You shall be your own boss. You may have to shoulder the entire responsibilities single handedly. Nothing can deter you from your path. You have struggled hard to reach where you are and are in no mood to let this go. Your perseverance and strong convictions will definitely see you through. Though, in the process, it is possible that your aides may back out or some envious opponents may try to create trouble for you. In both the circumstances, you will have to fend for yourself. The self-employed need to focus on solving their problems creatively and do not lose the vision of your targets.
29.finance: This period indicates profits and gains and an enhanced financial stability. You have worked really hard and now is the time to enjoy the fruits of your labor. You can expect an increase in your finances - money may flow in from different sources; it could be an increment in salary, a bonus, an unexpected gift or inheritance. The debts which you had long written off as unrecoverable now stand the chance of being recovered with little or no efforts on your part. A new venture shall be successful. Businessmen and traders can expect to increase their earnings by way of commissions, subsidies, etc. New business contacts and some overseas business deals will only add to the income. With a remarkable improvement in your finances, it is now time to think of ways to manage and invest it wisely. Long term capitalization will yield handsome returns. It is also a good period to gamble in risky ventures and speculations. Just use your sensibility and intuitions in the right proportion. You may strengthen your financial security further by making wise investments in insurance policies or some social security schemes. Be guarded against extravagant spending and rash investments.

30.name: Eight of Wands
30.love: This card indicates strong feelings of love and attraction. Sudden changes in the status of relationships is also seen.  Cupid shall soon strike the singles and eligible with the arrows of love and you might initiate a sincere and ever lasting relationship. It can be someone totally unknown or someone you have never expected. Be gentle and easy-going in your approach. Those already in a committed relationship may be feel that things are not progressing the way they should. You need to have trust and patient. Let matters of the heart take their own sweet time to resolve themselves. A chance meeting with someone can change your entire life. You shall enthusiastically pursue your love interest. Both your emotions and passions are raring to find an expression. You shall focus all your energies toward making a relationship more successful. You may discover some unexplored trait of your partner which will only add to the spark in the relationship and help you two to come closer. You may plan a romantic holiday to an exotic place or may just decide upon an adventure travel to different destinations over a short span of time.
30.career: This is a golden time for change, movement and transformation. You have had faced your share of struggles and rejections. Things are going to change for the best. You are going to get very busy now. The unemployed may be offered a dream job – that too at a salary and perks much more than they expected. You may consider changing your job or the department you are currently working in. There is a scope to move forward with confidence towards a higher level of power and position at your work place. Those desirous of higher education may get admission in a reputed university or institute of their choice. Now is the time to prove your mettle. You can now fearlessly move ahead with your new and innovative ideas. Your sincerity and honesty will open up new potentials of progress for you. Some delays and obstacles may slow down the progress of your ventures; but nothing can stop them from being completed fruitfully. Everything will move forward effectively as per your plans. It will appear as if the whole Universe is conspiring to help you emerge a winner. You can now revel and bask in the glory of your achievements.
30.finance: This period indicates a rewarding phase that has arrived after a long wait full of struggles. You will enjoy a highly satisfactory and happy financial period in your life. Major financial changes are foreseen – and all for the better. Money shall flow in from various sources.  You may win a lottery or inherit some property. Your life shall seem more opulent and comfortable these days. Artistic pursuits can earn you a fair sum of money as well.  There is a likelihood that you may take decisions in haste. It is recommended that you do not invest your hard earned cash into shares or any speculative activities. New investments can wait for some time. All your business undertakings will be financially rewarding. Creative hobbies such as writing or painting may well be turned into a lucrative profession. This is the perfect time for you to take a break from the busy daily schedules, go on a vacation and revel on your hard earned money. Quick movement of money is indicated in this phase. Hence, you should also control extravagant spending, manage your finances prudently and strive towards keeping your budget balanced. Focus on saving for the future.

31.name: Nine of Wands
31.love: Be cautious and careful in your personal interactions. You may have shown explicit interest in someone, but now are tired and frustrated of waiting for his response. It would be wise not to expect much from your relationship at present. A past failed affair may prevent you from trusting anyone or committing to a new relationship. You can take your own time to take a decision; in the meanwhile, enjoy your single status. You may need to keep patience a wee bit longer.You may be feeling very low now in your personal life. Nothing seems to be working in the way you would want them to. You may feel let down by your partner; you may feel that you are the only one who is working hard to make this relationship work. The idea of moving on will arise in your mind. But you love your mate too much to let him go. The problem may not be as huge as you imagine it to be. You can and will try your best to work out a solution. Bringing about small changes in perceptions and introducing some light fun elements in your relationship can help salvage the situation.
31.career: The first thing you need to do is to overcome your anxiety and tensions. You may fear losing your job or a prestigious project. You may be running short of creative ideas. Do not despair. You have all you need to achieve your goals. You have enough courage and stamina to put up a good fight, no matter how worn-out or frustrated you are. Do not focus too much on your past failures. Assemble  your resources and concentrate on completing the projects on hand. This is the time to awaken your inner strength and use your charismatic zeal to overcome hurdles and emerge a winner. Those in job need to keep their options open. New opportunities shall open up once you get past your insecurities and fears. Focus on completing one task at a time. This is not a good time to take risks. Keep away from new investments and speculations. Trust your own instincts; do not be misled by the counsels of other. It would be wise to ponder well over an issue before speaking out your mind about it. Positive affirmations and optimistic outlook would help you to deal with the worst of situations and emerge a winner.
31.finance: Financially, you may feel hemmed between limited resources and increasing outgoings. You may not be able to keep control over your cash reserves. But worrying would not benefit at all. Maintain your cool will. Keeping emotions aside, you will now have to take logical steps and plan your future course of action; all the time concentrating on ways to reduce overheads as much as possible. Take time to analyze your monetary situation; budgeting would be of help here. Prioritize your needs and think about the potential sources of finances. Look out for new means of earning income, howsoever small it may be. Even a small ray of hope will see you through. Remember, these challenging circumstances shall provide the foundation of your bright, secure future. If you stay optimistic, you will surely come up with new ideas of augmenting your income and savings. Sell off unwanted materials, turn your hobby into a profession, pick up an evening job, walk short distances instead of taking the cab – all these small steps taken will definitely bring the money ringing back to the coffers. Only courageous strides will help you overcome the challenging financial crunch.

32.name: Ten of Wands
32.love: Things are not looking very bright in the personal area. You may be feeling very burdened in an alliance. Look out for those trivial issues in your relationship which need attention before they grow huge enough to disturb your mental peace. Your partner may seem uncooperative at the moment; either he is too busy or is himself passing through a rough period. His aloofness and disinterested attitude can be very disturbing. You may not be able to give enough quality time to your personal life due to your work commitments. You may feel there is no love left between you two. That is not the case; in reality, one or both of you may presently be preoccupied in some other issues or tasks and may not be able to give your relationship the attention it calls for.  It is time to sit down for a heart-to-heart talk and sort out your problems. Try to bring harmony and balance in your relationship; you may seek the help and counsel of an experienced person to set things right. If necessary, it would be wise to seek counseling from a professional expert on relationships. Taking advice from close family members and friends too would be a great idea.
32.career: This may prove to be a stressful day wherein you will have to deal with many issues at the same time. You may have to shoulder increased responsibilities. It would be a rather taxing and a busy day at work. Pending work will keep piling up. Situation may seem to be getting out of hand. You may find it difficult to meet deadlines. The unemployed will get a new job; but they may have to struggle a lot to keep it. The independent minded will find it difficult to adhere to the dictatorial rules of their bosses. They may feel restricted creatively. But they shall soon realize that these very strict rules laid the foundations of their successful careers. It is advisable to set your priorities right and accordingly modify your schedule. Do not commit to more than what you can deliver. You need to do two things – take regular breaks and learn to say ‘no’ when someone tries to take undue advantage of you. Do not hesitate to ask for assistance. Your venture or project has reached a very crucial stage and is nearing completion; this is no time to back out. Your perseverance and patience will finally pay off well.
32.finance: Your financial status seems stuck at the moment. Revenues seem to be trickling down at a fast pace and no other source of income is visible. You need to start approaching your monetary situation in a much calmer and logical way. It is time to reassess your finances. Plan for the best but be ready for the worst. Running away or denying the problems will not help solve matters. No doubt, you’ve been feeling over-burdened by the multiplying expenses, so now it’s time for you to come up with a master plan and stick to it. You are resourceful and capable enough to come up with an ingenious solution. It’s a good time for you to get creative with ways to bring in more money, especially if you have any sort of artistic hobby. You can also earn extra cash by disposing off the redundant assets or those possessions which you do not really need at the moment. Now is also a good time for you to ask for help, if you truly need it. Check all the minute details and read thoroughly all the terms and conditions well before taking a loan. Be assured that your hard work will eventually pay off handsomely.

33.name: Page of Wands
33.love: This period bring along a lot of passion and drama. A new love or romance will bring a positive and exciting energy into your life. Matters of the heart will bring fresh vigor, vibrancy and new beginnings to your life. You may decide to step out of a superfluous relationship. A new relationship is on the horizon marking the beginning of an exciting period. But there is a catch here. A love affair may start very quickly and end as abruptly as it started. You shall relentlessly pursue your lover interest; but do not overdo it. A young friend will come to your support and assistance. He may help you see and understand things from a new different perspective. Family issues shall be solved and settled amicably. You may travel to new unexplored places. You and your partner maybe spend a leisurely and romantic vacation in some faraway dream locations trying out new creative and fun things together. You may decide to go in for an image makeover. Married couples may plan conception of a child and shall succeed in it. Your changing relationships shall prove to be a voyage of discovering your own self and your true purpose in life.
33.career: You are likely to receive some good news today regarding a new job. Alternatively, you shall get an excellent opportunity to progress in your career. You shall feel inspired and motivated by your inner voice to make some new beginnings. You will recognize your latent talents and shall be eager to capitalize on it. This is an excellent time to trust your instincts and pursue your dreams with a spirit of adventure. You may receive an exciting offer of a promotion or an opportunity to progress in your career. You shall start a work very enthusiastically; but may need encouragement and assistance to see it through its completion. Be wary of careless mistakes which may appear insignificant at this point of time, but may have disastrous repercussions. You do have the capability to put your creativity and imagination to the best possible use. Businessmen and self-employed enthusiasts may start a new project. Your novel ideas will be appreciated by younger clients. It would be prudent to double check your final output to rule out any minor glitches. Do not take any decision in haste; consider all the factors with a cool mind before arriving at a verdict.
33.finance: A prosperous and plentiful time begins for you.  Both income and savings will expand gradually. You can expect to receive some good news relating to your finances that will cheer you. Your personal income would increase multifariously. You would be able to contribute in a substantial way to the family revenue. Investments shall yield good returns. Your enthusiasm has the competence to drive loss making ventures towards profitability.  A hobby turned profession will prove to be an additional source of income. If everything goes as per plans, you can even expect a big bonus in the form of a lucrative partnership offer or a new prestigious project. It would be prudent to consult a financial expert who would be able to guide and advise you in regards your fiscal matters. Financially it is a very good time, no doubt. Nevertheless, be cautious and patient in your approaches. Do not rush into anything involving lots of risk and speculation. Trust your instincts; be organized and remain grounded. Time is ripe for you to set long term goals and start long-term planning on financial front. Adopting a sensible savings and investment policy would ensure a secured future. Do not forget to set aside some cash for contingencies and emergencies.

34.name: Knight of Wands
34.love: At this moment, you are seeking the best of both the worlds – your personal freedom and an uninhibited affair. You are ready for a flirtatious and no-strings-attached relationship. Your charming and charismatic manners would attract many suitors. At the moment, you are looking for some fun and casual dating rather than a long term or a committed relationship. You shall not be short of willing partners who are as eager as you to have some fun and frolic.
