An interesting person may make a sudden entry on the scene and you would share a very romantic and passionate relationship till it lasts.A casual friendship with a colleague may advance to a serious relationship after some time. You may be infatuated by someone younger to you in your professional circle. It would be better to clearly declare your intentions of not wanting a serious committed relationship at the very outset of your association to prevent heart breaks in the future. You may have a minor tiff with your mate over not giving enough time to your relationship. A romantic outing with your beloved will make your day. You may even plan a trip abroad. Time is also right to shift residence.
34.career: This is a very positive time for your professional life. You may get new job offers – most probably involving constant travelling or posting to a foreign land. Anything challenging, creative or competitive attracts you. Your projects and responsibilities will increase enormously and keep you very busy; but you shall be able complete all your work immaculately with your renewed energy and confidence levels. You may be transferred to a new department or location. You may start a new project today. Time is right to put the available resources to optimum use and get the desired results. You will come up with resourceful and innovative ideas to complete your tasks in the best possible manner. You shall be proud of your achievements. Businessmen shall be impatient to implement their revolutionary ideas. Your business proposals will attract enthusiastic patrons and investors. This is the precise time to turn your intuition and enthusiasm into action and to move ahead with full confidence and preparedness. However, do not rush into things. You deserve a well-earned break from work; you can make plans to go off on a short vacation which will only help to rejuvenate you and recharge your energies.
34.finance: A satisfactory financial cycle has begun. You are likely to make great strides in your career. In fact, you are now more than eager to take on challenging assignments provided they pay you very well. You may switch over to a more paying job or be associated with a more profitable venture. Your enthusiasm and creativity shall be instrumental in reducing substantial overheads thereby resulting in larger profit margins.  There is a possibility of you being reckless with the suddenly gained finances.This time is absolutely right to encash your innovative and farsighted business ideas. Investors and financers would be ready to fund you. You may stumble upon some latent untapped talent of yours which may prove to be a money spinner. Cash will flow in steadily. Let this not be a reason to splurge on frivolous spending. Nor should you lend out to unscrupulous people with shaky credit standing or questionable reputation. Financial status will remain good provided you keep a check on wasteful expenditures. You may be tempted to try your hand in speculations and lotteries. Do not be lured into making investments in high-risk securities or ‘get-rich-quick’ schemes.

35.name: Queen of Wands
35.love: You are likely to experience some pleasurable moments in love and romance. Falling in love would be so easy and elevating. People of opposite sex will be drawn towards your magnetic persona. You will seek attention and get ample of it.  You shall be able to cause many hearts to flutter by your charismatic manners and captivating words. Friends or colleagues may introduce you to someone interesting. Love at first sight is possible. There exists also a possibility of a relationship with a boss or a colleague. The single and eligible are likely to be lured into a romantic relationship. A chance meeting may well be the beginning of a new and lasting relationship. A woman will have a captivating influence on you. Alternatively, if you are a woman, you shall be able to inspire and lure many by your witty and charming manners. Emotions shall be sparked and passions ignited. Your partner would be instrumental in bringing out the best in you. Some of you may plan to go for their second honeymoon. The married couples who have been thinking of starting a family can now put their plans to action.
35.career: You shall be capable of taking on more work and shall get good opportunities to be successful in your career path. Your determination and strong intent to succeed in everything will drive you to be more energetic and accomplish many things. Confident and excited, you shall feel particularly motivated to accomplish your goals. You may be assisted in your efforts by a woman. You may come up with new innovative ideas which shall be approved and appreciated by your contemporaries.  You may be offered a job of your liking and choice. You can expect positive developments at work. Your productivity would increase and you would be able to deliver better results than expected. Your ingenuities and hard work shall not go unnoticed. Your positive approach will help you overcome all hurdles. Businessmen will be able to make sound judgments. The self-employed would do well to cultivate and promote their own brand. Your overactive thoughts will keep flitting from one idea to another. You will need to guard against a fluctuating mind. Do not waste much time in thinking; this is the time for action. Try to be calm and do not hesitate to seek advice or help if confused.
35.finance: You shall not be short of finance. Life is quite comfortable and convenient at this point of time. Making money will now become easy for you. You shall be able to earn enough and more without having to put in much struggles or strain. You shall be able to pile up a decent amount of savings. You can utilize these savings to buy long term assets or plough them back in your business ventures. Those who are just out of college shall be offered a lucrative job. Stay practical and down-to-earth, in all your expectations. It would be wise to investigate thoroughly before making any new investments; avoid speculations. The self-employed can expect brisk business. Freelancers will have the flair to sell their ideas and works. You may come up with innovative ideas; you will however have to also make efforts to implement them. The returns shall adequately compensate the amount of pains put in the execution. You would love to splurge on luxury shopping; but would succeed in keeping a restraint on your spending. You can of course spend on interiors, renovations or home improvements or anything which would make your home a comfortable and blissful place.

36.name: King of Wands
36.love: The singles and eligible may find love interest at their work place. You may be attracted to a married person who may not reveal his marital status to you. Some background search will help. You may come across someone you will seem to be a perfect match for you; who will revere you and respect you for who you are. This may prove to be a very passionate phase in your love life. Emotions shall be on a roller coaster; desires and urges shall climax.  Your love feelings shall be positively reciprocated in a big way! If you have been facing problems in your relationships, today is the day to use your communicative skills effectively and clear all differences. Your soothing words will bring the other person around to see and understand your point of view. You may look to introduce some fun elements in your relationship. You can plan an adventurous trip to an exotic place or indulge in some energetic, outdoor sports such as paragliding. You can set out to explore new unvisited places of interest. Be careful not to be so lost in your love life that you ignore other important aspect of your life.
36.career: Time is ripe to put your best foot forward. Your ambitious and farsighted vision will help you achieve your goals today. You shall come up with decisive suggestions which will have long term impact. Many possibilities will open up before you. You shall be able to make the right choices with a clear mind and a positive self-righteousness. You will come across as a creative and formidable force. You will come across as creative, passionate and energetic person. You may be offered a new job or increased responsibilities today. You shall get ample opportunities to prove your work capabilities. You will make outstanding progress at work and win accolades and promotions. Those who are stuck up in a stagnant job may decide to opt out and look for more challenging openings. If you have been thinking to be self-employed, then this may turn out to be just the right career choice for you. It is time to implement any new business strategy you might have and take control of your business dealings. You shall benefit from the advice given by an experienced person. Explore your options, dream big and try new things, but remember, you shall alone be responsible and accountable for your actions and decisions.
36.finance: This may be an exceptionally rewarding and profitable period for you. A new job may be offered to you. You may get a chance to work with an experienced person who will mentor you in the new occupation. You would be able to learn many new tricks of trade from him. You shall get enough opportunities prove your mettle in your area of expertise. You shall be able to complete your assignments successfully and this may find expression in form of a promotion or elevated status. You are all set to take risks and invest in ventures which you think will yield you abundant returns. In case you are facing a financial crunch, you may look out for an additional source or means of earning income. It might as well be trading or commission related work. Any work which gives you monetary freedom is fine to you. A newly discovered talent can be put to professional practice. A windfall gain is possible. Freshers from college may decide to venture into business. Businessmen may come up with new offers to attract customers and thereby increase their sales and revenues. You may proceed with new projects, fresh investments, etc.

37.name: Ace of Cups
37.love: A new chapter of love and happiness begins. It is time for beginnings of new relationships – romantic and otherwise. If there is one thing which is very important to you at this moment, it is love. Now is a great time to meet new people and enhance your social circle. You may be a part of many celebrations and auspicious events such as engagements, weddings, house warnings parties, etc. The unattached can expect to meet someone very interesting and attractive; someone who will compel them to believe in love at first sight. It is also possible that you may come across a special friend from the past and sparks may fly. Do not hesitate to approach with an open heart once you are convinced of the right choice. Your proposal shall be positively reciprocated. Those already in a relationship you shall be able to overcome your differences and grievances and finally agree to move ahead positively. You would now be ready to appreciate the virtues in your partner and ignore the shortcomings; thereby committing to a lasting relationship full of romance and love. This is also a good time to get passionate and intimate with each other. Your mutual love and joy will be enhanced by the good news of a pregnancy.
37.career: You have worked hard and enough; now is the time to rest and relax. Nothing much is happening on the work front right now. The rush and the push are now over. It is time to enjoy this lull period before the next assignment or project makes you busy again. Those waiting for some news regarding their career may need to wait for some more time. Good results of past efforts shall soon begin to flow in the form of appreciation, promotions and more responsibilities. You may be given some new job or promoted to a new department shortly. Till that time, you can concentrate on your own self. Take this chance to rejuvenate for the upcoming challenges. You may come up with new ideas of making improvements in your workplace.Some of you would be eager to start a new career of your liking which would give you a sense of greater satisfaction and fulfillment.  Creative people shall be excited about the prospects of a new project. Businessmen may utilize this time to study and scrutinize new goals, plans and schemes. Activity at work shall be renewed. You shall be overwhelmed with a constructive flow of ingeniously innovative ideas which will win applauds and profits in the long run.
37.finance: There shall be no change in the financial situation. Neither shall there be any economic difficulty. You shall have enough monetary resources to fulfill all your needs and wishes. Life will be relaxed and happy. You can expect some encouraging news relating to enhancement of your funds. A new job opportunity, a promotion, a bonus, a new task – could become a reason of having more cash on hand. You shall be able to recover your past losses and enter a comfortable phase. A gift or an inheritance is not ruled out. You may accumulate all your resources and invest in something which is of personal importance to you. It is time you start saving up some money for the future. Wise investments will ensure a smooth ride in the days to come. Following a balanced budget is the best way for you to save a little cash. Your expenses might increase, but you shall have enough in your funds that will last for a long time. Businessmen can expect some new contracts that will improve their financial positions and will also help them in paying off all their debts. You may enter into a partnership with a reliable and trustworthy person.

38.name: Two of Cups
38.love: This is the time to focus on personal relationships. It augurs new beginnings – new friendships or love affairs. Your search for an ideal mate shall end. Those new in a relationship shall have an enjoyable period now when the power of attraction and romance are at a peak. They shall find this association extremely rewarding and fulfilling. Those in an established relationship can utilize this time to have an emotional and heart-to-heart talk with each other. If you have recently been through a rough patch, it is time to forgive each other and reconcile your differences.  You need to relax and be intimate with each other. Love is in the air. The unattached can expect to be attracted towards someone whom they have already known since some time. You shall come across many opportunities to get to know each other better. This is a favorable period to get engaged or married. The married may find their relationship strengthened having emerged successful after many trials and tribulations. You will now find balance and harmony besides love in your alliance. Relations with family and friends will be pleasurable. Do not force yourself in to any kind of association. Just relax and see the Universe helping you find true love.
38.career: Professional life will proceed smoothly. The unemployed may find a suitable job. You shall feel relaxed after a long time. Things have started moving ahead; yet you need to be on your guard and avoid silly mistakes. Keep away from lethargy. An excellent opportunity may come up. Do not hesitate to take up new challenges and responsibilities which will test your skills and help you gain new experiences. You shall be able to complete your projects successfully. Appreciation and rewards shall follow. Problems will arise; but this time, you shall be equipped and prepared to resolve them. Coworkers shall be cooperative. This is also an appropriate time to sign important documents; could be a job contract, a new partnership deal, etc. You can embark on a new venture. You may have to face some pressure and competition; but you shall be able to cross these hurdles easily. Those in business will be able to crack profitable deals in matters related to real estate, machineries, properties, etc. You may kick start a new project. Do not hesitate to take risks; they  will yield good revenues in the long run. Older investments will give good returns. It is advisable to consult some financial expert while making new investments.
38.finance: You shall see an improvement in your financial status. Money prospects are getting better. Unexpected good news may be on the way. You shall be able to earn decent gains with your hard work. However keep away from unethical ways of making money or else you may lose everything; you may even get into some legal trouble. You will not exactly be having heaps of cash; but shall have enough to spend on your necessities, comforts and a bit more. You shall be able to balance your incomes and expenses very well. A lot of financial problems may be sorted out. You may find it a bit difficult to save; but do try to keep some funds aside for sudden unexpected contingencies. New business opportunities shall come knocking your way. Entrepreneurs shall be able to combine various money sources for their new projects. This will help in increasing business and profits as well. Businessmen may find financiers or partners who would be interested in investing in their plans. Joint ventures made now shall prove to be lucrative in the long run. However keep away from risky investments and business contracts. People shall be helpful in many ways – in getting contacts and contracts, finding new workplace, etc.

39.name: Three of Cups
39.love: This is a time to celebrate the joy of love. This is s an especially favorable period for romance, friendships and matters of the heart. You shall find happiness and fulfillment in your relationships. Many opportunities for new love affairs will come up. Those who are single can expect to meet their Prince Charming. They will find the love of their love who will sweep them off their feet. This person will find acceptance from your family and friends too. You may realize that he is the right person to become your life partner. You may spend some exciting time together. Those already in a relationship may go on a dream holiday which will only help in bringing them closer. The married couples shall bask in emotional warmth. All misunderstandings would now be resolved with mutual discussions. You shall resolve to stand by each other – come what may.  Relationships will get more passionate. You may decide to start a family. You shall enjoy a peaceful, fulfilling time with your family and friends. You may be introduced to new people and your social circle will expand. This is a great time to let your hair down and have some fun. Family get together, dinner dates, birth celebrations, etc. shall rule the day.
39.career: You can expect some good news in your professional life. It could be related to a new job of enhancement in work position. You may now come out of a problem you had been facing since long. A new horizon will open up in your field of work. You may be offered a new assignment with greater remunerations. Income will rise. You are ready to take on the increased responsibilities as long as you are not pressurized into doing things in a hurried way. A little cooperation may help to create a congenial working atmosphere. You would be able to work best in a close-knit team of efficient workers.  Positive energy at work place shall result in achievements and abundance. If you are looking for a change in career, you shall find one very much of your liking and choice. Businessmen shall make profits. A new partnership is in the offing. Influential people shall be interested in financing your ventures. They shall prove instrumental in advancing the business and clientele as well. A project may be launched or may see a successful completion. This calls for a celebration.  Entrepreneurs may decide to collaborate with an established and a reputed firm. This association will result in greater turnover and profits.
39.finance: This is the time of abundance and wish fulfillments; a time to enjoy the fruits of you hard work. Money would come in from different sources. You may get a new lucrative job or a promotion with an attractive pay package. A bonus may be announced. Any financial crisis you have faced earlier, no longer exists. Unexpected and windfall gains are not ruled out. You may win a competition or a lottery or get an inheritance. Single entrepreneurs may come across reliable and creditworthy financial partners who share the same vision and goals as them. This would provide the necessary boost to your business. You may now spend on things you had long yearned for. You have enough funds to spend on personal and family comforts and luxuries. Nevertheless, you need to watch out against unwise spending. It is important to save the funds and invest it wisely for the future.  Material things are not always indicators of happiness; you may utilize this time to relax and have a gala time with your family. Sharing a part of your fortune with others will multiply your happiness. However, beware of unscrupulous friends who may come close to you looking for loans and financial help.

40.name: Four of Cups
40.love: Nothing much seems to be happening on the personal front. Those in a relationship may find it difficult to communicate with their partners; or it could be the other way around. Dissatisfaction and boredom may have set in your relationship. Your aloofness and indifference may drive your mate crazy. Actually you are so absorbed in your own thoughts that you may not even notice the gaping drift between you two. You need to come out of this isolation and use this time to bring the spark back in your love life before it is too late. Do not take your relations for granted; devote some time and energy into your alliance. You may plan a short trip so that you can spend some quality time with each other and revitalize your relationship.  The singles have spent enough time waiting for the right person to appear on the scene. You need to get out and socialize – there may be someone who has been interested in you for quite some time and is waiting for you to notice him/her. You may try to get closer to someone whom you have adored since long. Chances are that this person may act difficult or may try to avoid you.
40.career: This is the period for self-introspections.  Lately you have been feeling quite bored with life in general and with your work in particular. You may find your work very uninteresting and monotonous. There seems nothing to motivate you or ignite your creativity. Dissatisfaction and boredom may set in. it is also possible you are contemplating too many options. You may be investing a lot of time in deliberation and devoting very little time to actual work. The unemployed may have received one or more job offers. Of course, you must consider the future prospects well before accepting it. But do not take too long to make a choice; else you may lose out on some good opportunities. Those already in a job, you may be so self-absorbed in your work that you may not notice the developments near you. As a result, you may miss some important openings. A kind of passivity seems to have set in. You have already put in a lot of efforts in your work; but may not be very happy with the outcome. You need time to relax and unwind yourself. Take some time out to be with yourself. This will help you attain emotional stability which will show in your performance.
40.finance: You may feel very discouraged with your financial state as situation is not as pleasant as you expected it to be. When you liken your status with others, you may find you are lagging far behind and this may be a cause of discontentment. Do not waste time in unnecessary comparisons; you may miss out on important opportunities. You need to set out realistic financial targets, assess the status of resources available and come up with a plan to achieve your goals. Actually the financial situation may not be so very bad after all; you may have been exaggerating the issue. May be your expectations have been very high. It would help you to focus on what you have instead on what should you have. Invest in sound ventures to get decent returns. It would be wise to stick to the tried and tested methods to earn and save money. High risk undertakings should best be avoided for now. Also stay away from speculation as your mental state is not balanced in money matters at this point of time. You may benefit greatly if you take advice of a financial expert. Abundance is not reflected only in financial gains; seek happiness beyond material things.

41.name: Five of Cups
41.love: You may be passing through a rough patch in your relationships. You may try your best to save this association; but to no avail. You may suffer heartbreak and you are surely not going to take it well. The breakup may leave you shattered and drained out. You have been so much deep into this relationship that you are not ready to believe all is over. You may desperately cling to the shattered pieces of your relationship. This would only cause you more pain and take more time for you to rise above your agony. You will have to realize that it is the relationship which has broken, not you. Do not despair. This affair was not just meant to be. You may try to seek solace in loving memories of the times spent together. If you have just been separated from your beloved, then take some time to get over the hurt and the sorrow. Living in the past will only result in missing new opportunities.  Take this time to be with yourself and do things for your won happiness. Do not be in a hurry to get into another relationship too soon. Remember that the past is over; and it is you who will have to create your own future.
41.career: This is not the time of pursuing too many goals. Reassess your situation and concentrate on those areas which really matter to you. You may have to face some delays and disappointments in your professional life. Interviews may be postponed.  You may get frustrated waiting for the appointment letter. Do not be depressed; this is a passing phase. Those employed may be working harder than usual spending more hours in the workplace than at home. Yet you may not be enjoying your work and may feel that you are not getting your due. Some of you may feel stuck in a job which is not of your liking. Do not rush into taking any drastic step such as resigning from the job. You may then have to remain jobless for quite some time to come. Your perseverance and patience will surely pay off; though delayed. Businessmen may find sales sliding down and losses mounting up. They may find it tough to cope up with the ongoing competition. Some of you may feel betrayed by a partner or business associate. You may even think of shutting down the venture. Do not give up until you have tried all the options. You will have to find ways to motivate yourself.
41.finance: This is a period of uncertainty in financial matters. You may see fluctuations in your economic status. You may receive some good news of a gain or inheritance. But it may not give you much relief as the whole procedure of its realization may be quite time consuming. Those in employment may have to face innumerable hitches. Their salary may be delayed due to some economic problem faced by their company. A loss of a job is also indicated. You may miss out on some good career opportunity. Some of you may decide to be self-employed and start a venture on their own. Few others may seek jobs with lesser pay package but greater satisfaction and prospects. Projects may be delayed. Some new undertakings may turn out to be a failure. Losses may rise to the extent that you may have to apply for heavy loans. Financial help may not be forthcoming. In such a case, you may decide to shut down or sell off the business. You may try your best to salvage the situation and reduce the losses to the minimum. Do not focus too much on the hardships and problems; else you may miss out on the incoming blessing.

42.name: Six of Cups
42.love: This is not a time to reflect too much on your past. Singles need to be careful in matters of the heart. An old flame or an ex-lover may try to gain an entry back into your life. You too may get emotional reminiscing about your past days. But there is hardly any future in this relationship. You need to understand what is over, is over for good. Even if you try to rekindle the spark, this may turn out to be a temporary affair. Those already in a relationship my face some problems and may have immature arguments, conflicting over irrelevant things. You both need to grow beyond the initial euphoric period of your romance and face life together in a much more understanding manner. You should focus on building up a happy future instead of dwelling on the past. An old friend may appear to help you sort out matters in your personal life. Get together with family members and reunion with friends shall bring back many old and pleasant memories. An unexpected inheritance or gift from a family member is likely. You may plan a trip to an interesting, exotic place. Meeting people from different culture groups can prove to be very invigorating.
42.career: This is a period of new, positive beginnings in your professional life. You may come across a new job opportunity where you may have to deal with children or people younger than you. You have all the abilities necessary to achieve your goals. If you have just got an employment, you will find it easy to adapt to your new work environment. This is the time you can experiment with your innovative ideas and put your latent talents to productive use. New opportunities bring in greater responsibilities. You may have to choose between a secure job and one which gives you flexibility of thoughts and creative freedom. A promotion is in the offing. You may be transferred to a place of your choice. Those who have invested a lot of time and energy in some projects shall be recognized and rewarded for their past efforts. An influential contact or friend shall be instrumental in getting new or additional business contracts and clients. This is the perfect time for you to be investing in ventures that involve creativity and community work. Working in a group would be more rewarding than going solo. A past friend may offer to partner with you in business.
42.finance: You shall soon come out of your monetary problems. Financial status will be good with cash flowing in steadily as long as you are putting in the best of your efforts. Promotions will bring in increments in salary. Be prudent in your spending. Do not let your heart rule your head; else you may make some impulsive purchases of things which you do not really require. You may fruitfully spend on a community project for needy children or homeless aged people. Whatever you give to the Universe is always returned back to you – with interest.Financial benefits may come through inheritance or a gift from a senior relative. Windfall gains are also expected through speculations, lottery, etc. You may suddenly recover some dues or debts given long back.   It would be wise to secure your financial interests and avoid all kinds of unfair dealings. Follow all the legal rules and formalities if starting a venture in partnership. Businessmen shall see success. While making new investments, follow your instincts. Investments in antique properties shall prove profitable. You may decide to revive a shutdown venture. You may come up with some new ideas which may not be conventional but shall pay good returns.

43.name: Seven of Cups
43.love: Nothing seems to be working right in your personal relationships. In spite of having everything, you may still feel that something is missing. You may be so much caught up in your imaginary world of love that you may not see the reality. Scratch the surface and you may find some grave problem which you refuse to acknowledge. The singles may be wooed by many suitors whom they find interesting and appealing. Each one of them may promise you the skies. It is for you to be clear about what you are looking for –sensual gratification or emotional contentment. Consider your choices well. Do not rush into a relationship nor be pressurized into taking a quick decision. Trust your instincts. Some of you may not gather enough courage to commit to one person. Those in love may be so absorbed in their world that they may not see the cracks happening. It is time to step out of your fantasy world and take a stock of your relationships. You may sense a lack of personal contentment and happiness. You may realize that though you have sacrificed a lot for your love, your own needs have been left unfulfilled.  Your partner may move away from you for want of personal space.
43.career: Things are optimistic on the career front. This is an excellent time when you shall find many incredible possibilities open up before you. You just need to contemplate on the pros and cons of each possibility and make the right choice. Do not be overwhelmed or confused by the number of options. You may ask for advice from others who are well informed or experienced. Know what your priorities are and work in that direction. Instead of scattering your energies in different pursuits, it would be wiser to focus on the work at hand. A wrong decision taken can turn a golden opportunity to a major disaster. Those in the creative or entertainment fields shall progress well. Your wishes would be fulfilled and give you great happiness.Businessmen need to be careful and prudent while making investments. Beware of get-rich-quick schemes.  If you want your dreams to turn into reality, now is the time to plan, to organize things and come up with the most practical strategies. It is very important to set up realistic goals and work persistently towards their achievement. Do not get worked up by some illusory problems. Work load may increase. Just keep working steadfastly and success will be yours.
43.finance: You need to be very careful in money matters in this period. You may not be able to keep a check on you expenses. Choices must to be made carefully in regards to future goals and ideals. Do not spend indiscriminately relying on probable impending profits. Don’t count the chickens before they are hatched. You may need to prioritize your expenditures and outgoings. Gains may take time to come by. Do not be dismayed by the delay. You must concentrate on increasing your savings by cutting down your costs and adopting money saving tactics. You need to make financial judgments in a mature and professional manner.You may be confused about the investment choices to be made. You may be surrounded by a multitude of schemes and proposals; but may not be able to make up your mind as to which one to choose. You shall receive an offer which may seem to be too good to be true. In such a case, do not act in haste. Take your time to understand and analyze the creditworthiness and profitability of the venture before taking the final decision. You may have to wait till the facts are cleared. You shall be able to prosper in your endeavors with expert professional guidance and advice.

44.name: Eight of Cups
44.love: You may find that stagnation has set in your relationships. The spark is missing and it is time to sort things out. There could also be a temporary breakup. You may need to restart from the beginning and find out where and what went wrong. Mature thinking and heartfelt efforts may help revive the relationship and take it to a new, profounder level. But if things have gone beyond reparation, it may just mean that it is time to say goodbye. Some of you may realize that there is no hope nor future left in your current relationship. Instead of giving you any happiness, it is draining away your energies and leaving you worn-out and disappointed. Breaking away from the relationship would be painful; but then continuing with it is no less agonizing. You may, in such a case, decide to opt out of this relationship. Those who have just walked away from a relationship should utilize this time to heal from the past pains. They may need some time to be with themselves, to introspect and understand what exactly they need from life. They should not be in a hurry to get into another relationship. This is the time to focus on yourself and on your own happiness.
44.career: Nothing seems to be working right for you. The present work situation may be quite frustrating. You may not be happy with your current job. There could be many reasons for it – you may have reached a point of saturation, the work may no longer be challenging enough or your efforts are not being adequately appreciated or rewarded. Seniors may constantly find fault in your work; coworkers may not be cooperative and shall conspire against you. Make your best efforts to mend things. But if you do not see an improvement, you may well decide to move on. A loss of job is very probable – could be on your own account or due to some State policies or economic recession.You need a career where you can give an expressive to your creative aptitudes. You may feel an urgent need to explore new avenues and pursue your dreams. Be patient and wait for the right time to come. Dissatisfied employees may start applying for better employment options now; though the replies may take some time to come. The businessmen may have to incur financial setbacks in their ventures. They may decide to end a recurrently loss making project. You may need to hold on your dream or vision for some more time till things get better.
44.finance: Money-wise, things do not look very bright. You may be torn between the economic securities your job offers and the deep desire to move out and start with something which would be much to your liking. But rushing into something new without proper planning and a sound strategy could prove to be financially disastrous. Of course, you have realized you do not always need money to give you happiness and contentment. But financial security is also necessary. You may decide to give up a lucrative job for doing something which you are obsessive about. Your passion will one day give your stupendous returns – financially and otherwise. In order to maintain a healthy financial status, you may need to set out your priorities and be smart with your savings and expenditures. You may be lured to invest your money in schemes which promise bigger gains soon. Be cautious and make thorough investigations before putting your hard earned money in a new investment. Businessmen may be having a tough time maintaining a balance between revenues and overheads. Your turnover and profits may take a beating too. You may decide to close down a venture which is no longer viable. Tread slowly and carefully. Be assured this is a temporary phase.

45.name: Nine of Cups
45.love: This is a very good phase for relationships. You shall experience a lot of warmth and harmony around you. Someone whom you had long desired will now reciprocate with mutual feelings of love. Relationships will strengthen and shall potentially move on to the next level. You shall experience an out-of-the-world emotional and sensual satisfaction with your partner. Those looking for love can expect to come across it round the corner. You just need to move out and socialize; you will soon find him/her. If you are waiting for your partner to make the first move, then you will find him proposing to you in the most romantic way. An old friend or a colleague may express his deep feelings for you.Those already in a relationship will now find a greater depth and affection in their love. You would already have discovered that you two share many common interests and goals. If you have not been on good terms with your beau, it is now time to make the first move and rekindle the old spark of love. After all, it is time for celebrations. The married shall bask in the joy and happiness of the consummation of their relationship. They may go for a fun filled, lazy vacation and end up getting closer and cozier to each other.
45.career: This is the phase of fulfilment and accomplishments of dreams. Ask for it and it shall be granted. This is the right time to pursue and work towards what you want - with full faith and diligence. You shall be successful at interviews. You may find a job which allows you the freedom to experiment with your innovative ideas. You shall be proud of the fruits of your labor. Those in employment shall be pleasantly surprised to get a promotion sooner than they expected. Your talents and hard work will be acknowledged and appreciated. You may be asked to head a department or offered a posting to a place of their choice. Those in entertainment business stand to gain a lot. The free spirited entrepreneurs shall find enough capital and support to start a dream project. Ventures which had been stalled for want of resources can now be restarted with surety of being successful. Businessmen may earn a reward in recognition of their exemplary role in the commerce world. This is the appropriate time to lay strong foundations for the future. Do not hesitate to make small compromises to achieve great success. Overall, you shall be very happy with the stability and developments in your career.
45.finance: You shall experience a sense of financial stability and fulfilment. Monetary status will be sound. This is the time to concentrate on the advancement of economic goals in your professional life. Fiscal gains shall lead to emotional satisfaction and a rise in confidence. You shall be able to acquire whatever you desire and more. Those looking for a job shall find one with a good pay package. Some of you opt for a more lucrative career opportunity. Those employed shall be able to successfully complete a big assignment and shall be suitably remunerated. Your past efforts will be recognized, appreciated and rewarded. If you have been short of money, you will find things changing for the better. There shall be gain of cash and increase in your bank balance. You shall be able to repay your past dues and debts. You shall not be short of funds; you shall have enough to buy objects of comforts as well as a few luxuries. You may have money coming in from more than one source. This is a favorable time to start a new venture or make new investments. Long running projects will be completed successfully yielding excellent profits. No doubt, it is a period of abundance; but you still need to control your spending habits.

46.name: Ten of Cups
46.love: You are on the way to establishing lasting and fulfilling relationships. You shall be surrounded with love. You can expect pleasant surprises which shall excite and hearten you. You have been long tied up in your professional life. Now is the time to take a break and spend some quality time with your family and friends. If you have had some issues with someone close and dear, you may just forgive, forget and move on. The domestic atmosphere shall be very happy and harmonious.If you are single, you shall come across a very romantic and promising person who will just sweep you off your feet. This affair has all the chances to grow into a beautiful and lifelong relationship. If you have been wooing someone for quite some time, he/she will now reciprocate your feelings in a big way. Those already in a relationship have walked a long path, storming the odds together. The struggles only helped to bring you closer and your love to grow deeper. You can now decide to get engaged/married or plan a baby. Keep ego and arrogance out of your relationships. Just heed to the voice of your heart and relax in the glow of love.
46.career: This is a happy and fulfilling period as far as your professional life is concerned. You shall experience a big breakthrough in your career. You may finally acquire a job of your choice and liking. You may get an opportunity to work on a dream project. The employed shall feel totally at home and contented at their workplace. Relations with coworkers would be at their best. Colleagues and subordinates would offer their support and cooperation for your new endeavors or responsibilities. You shall be amply rewarded and appreciated for your contribution at work. You may bask in the glory of recognition and praise; but this is surely not a time to rest. Many more milestones are to yet be achieved. This is the time to reap harvest of the hard work you had invested in the past. Be alert and open to new opportunities. It is time to successfully implement your intuitive and genius ideas. Entrepreneurs shall find the right connections and contacts to develop their ventures. You shall be able to consolidate your professional reputation. Those already established in a business are likely to bring about some positive changes – you may adopt a new technology or shift your work place to a more aesthetic environment.
46.finance: This is a very positive period as far as your financial status is concerned.  If you have been facing economic issues, be relaxed. You shall be relieved of all your worries concerning shortage of funds. Those looking for an employment shall find one which will be well paying and of their liking. A long awaited promotion may come through bringing along its share of perks and increments. You may come up with creative ways of making money. You can expect gains from unexpected sources; you may get an inheritance or a gift from a distant relative or win a game of lottery. Those in artistic fields stand to gain a lot. They may bag lucrative contracts or projects. Money will keep flowing in; you may purchase things for family comforts such as a car or even a new comfortable dream house. Ample financial opportunities shall come your way. Entrepreneurs shall find enough resources and financers to venture into a new project. They may think of diversifying into a new line of operation or opening a new branch. Some long term investments will yield huge profits. Social contacts shall play a big role in your prosperity. It is advisable to share your abundance with the less fortunate ones. The more you give, the more you get – is the law of the Universe.

47.name: Page of Cups
47.love: This is a very positive period for love and relationships. You may receive some unexpected good news from or about a loved one – could be an engagement, a marriage or a child birth. Your mate may surprise you with a travel plan or a romantic date out. The singles should be prepared to be swept off their feet. You may get a proposal from an ardent admirer who has been pursuing you since long. He can be a younger person – full of life and zest. If you have a secret crush on someone, it is time to come open with your feelings. Those in a new relationship may discover they have many things in common and may decide to take their affair to the next emotional level. It is time to drop off the hard exterior and let your inner, playful child take over. There is nothing wrong in letting your emotions flow uninhibited and express themselves to people who matter the most to you. There is no harm in expressing your love in a more romantic and spirited manner. In fact, this will only help in bringing you two closer. Beware of a heartpain too; someone may break a promise which will hurt your immensely.
47.career: You are overwhelmed with a new feeling. On one hand you are drawn to your dismal past; on the other, you are being pulled to a new, optimist future. You are willing to work hard; yet are hesitant to seize the opportunity. You need to overcome this feeling of insecurity and develop self-confidence. You may have been feeling stuck in a mundane job; now is the time to take steps to look out for better options. You will find many career openings suitable for you. You need to pick up the vocation which you enjoy. You are most likely to be drawn towards glamorous jobs where you shall get a chance to show off your artistic skills. Entrepreneurs shall approach a problem from a different perspective and shall come up with a unique solution.  It is time for you to step out in the public eye. You are full of innovative creative energies right now. This is the right time to heed to your inner calling and to give expression to your resourcefulness and ingenuity.  The flood of ideas may confuse and baffle you. Try to handle the situation in a calm and controlled manner. You may think of enhancing your academic qualifications and skills further.
47.finance: You shall see an improvement in your economic situation. You may receive some good news related to your finances. You shall be able to intuitively sense new money making opportunities. This will boost your fiscal confidence and imagination. A seemingly insignificant gain may be turned into an extremely big profit by your creativity. You will have to use the same ingenuity to find creative ways to save your well earned money. It is also a time to clear off your pending debts and maintain a balance between you earnings and expenses.The unemployed may be offered a lucrative job of their liking. The artistic types may be called for auditions where they may get some real rewarding contracts. Those in business may find the right resources and financers to expand their business. They may also invest in some new cost saving technologies. Some of you may benefit from a speculation or an inheritance. This is the time you may re-examine your entire approach to financial management. Your finances are bound to improve as long as you make the most of the opportunities that come your way. Follow your instincts while making new investments. Do not let others take your decisions for you.

48.name: Knight of Cups
48.love: This shall prove to be a positive and fruitful period of your personal life. You are going to experience a very romantic and emotionally fulfilling phase. The singles and eligible should be prepared to be swept off their feet. It is time to follow your heart and to heed to your feelings instead of just daydreaming. Prince Charming is on the way, seeking an access into your heart and life. This is definitely not a time to be confused or afraid. You may go in for a makeover; concentrate on yourself – your looks and your happiness. You shall be asked out for a date.If you are currently in a relationship, then you may decide to take it to the next level – could be a proposal, engagement or marriage. The setting ought to be really romantic. The old fashioned way of proposing with flowers, chocolates and kisses would work the best. This is the time to come closer and be more intimate. You may plan a trip to some exotic place where you can spend some quality time with each other and have no one to disturb you. This could well be your memorable romantic escapade. The married may plan starting a family.
48.career: Things may not be very favorable or much to your liking currently. Nevertheless, you will have adjust and make the optimum use of the available resources. But be assured that things are going to change for the better. You shall soon see a transformation in your professional life; it could be a change in your way of looking at things. You can come across a new opportunity which will help you realize your long cherished dream. If looking for a new employment, you shall be able to present your best form at the interviews. If looking for a career change, you will get a break in a field of your choice. The employed shall experience a positive period. Those already in service shall find the work atmosphere very congenial and optimistic. A promotion or an increment you were long expecting will now come through. This is a good time for career development and advancement. It is also a favorable time to develop new productive plans and set fresh targets. You may consider starting a new business venture. You can expect ample orders or assignments. An acquaintance may turn out to be an influential contact for further business. You shall have to travel for work.
48.finance: This is a very optimistic period with respect to your financial status. It is a sign of the good times to come. You have been bothering too much about your fragile economic situation. The scenario may not be so bad after all. You may soon receive some good news. Your financial burden is likely to be eased with the sudden inflow of funds. Your loan application may be approved. You might quite unexpectedly recover some money that you had lent some time back. You may also gain monetarily through a bonus, a promotion or a new job opportunity.You will earn handsome returns for all your hard work. Your prudent thinking will help you to invest in safe schemes which will give assured good returns. There are indications that you are likely to gain considerably through speculation or unexpected sources. If you have been thinking of starting your own business, you can go for it. You may try your hand in some creative project. The new venture will yield substantial profits. You may find a sympathetic financial partner. Handle your newly found abundance with caution. Be frugal in your spending. Do not indulge in any unethical or illegal ways of making money.

49.name: Queen of Cups
49.love: This is a happy and positive period for you when you shall find peace and harmony in your relationships. You may be in a very emotional and romantic mood, but would choose to put up a serious appearance due to your work engagements. It is time you learn to relax and be more communicative about your feelings. If you are single, you may be wooed by two or more suitors. One of them could be a person known to you for quite some time – maybe a childhood friend. You are most likely to choose a clear-headed and stronger personality over a handsome hunk.  Loyalty and trust matter more to you than physical appearances. It would be wise to have an open and honest exchange of ideas and thoughts with each other before committing to a serious affiliation. Those already in a relationship shall share a beautiful sense of harmony. Love and sexual life will be blissful. This shall prove to be a super productive period with your cozy togetherness confirming the pleasantness and ecstasy of a passionately compatible alliance. You shall feel much respected and treasured by your loved one. Your relationship shall thrive and you can approach life with a new enthusiasm.
49.career: Career responsibilities and work load are likely to increase. You need to single-mindedly focus on your profession. Only dedicated efforts and determination can help you achieve your long term objectives. Do not be so engrossed in your personal life that you may miss an upcoming opportunity. Drudgery and monotony may bother you. You may have reached a stage of stagnation in your work area. Look out for new innovative ways to attain your targets. Be more organized and controlled. Relationships with coworkers will improve. Though, your boss may make some irrational and excessive demands from you. An experienced and wise mentor will help you overcome your difficulties and emerge a winner. The unemployed may be keen to do something which is close to your heart. You may be tired of waiting for the right job. Don’t be disheartened; it’s just that you have to try a bit more. You shall soon find a job of your liking and choice. Time is also appropriate for those who wish to be self-employed; especially for those who want to branch out in service sector. You shall be able to give excellent results in creative occupations too. Adding to you academic qualifications or taking some skill enhancing courses will help improve your career prospects.
49.finance: It is time to get cracking. Those looking out for a change in career to a more fulfilling and a lucrative work will find one. You may come up with a novel tactic to convert your dream job into a reality.  Time is favorable for those already in employment too. Your hard work and persistent efforts will finally pay off. You shall be amply reimbursed for it in form of cash and additional projects. You can come up with creative concepts to augment your income. Putting in extra hours of work or taking on an additional employment too would help raise finances. In short, you shall experience growing abundance in your life. You can utilize the additional cash on domestic improvement or for personal expenditures. Businessmen will have a smooth sailing time. You shall be able to recover the losses you had made in your ventures earlier. Your past debacles and losses shall serve as a lesson for future investments and fiscal policies. You can afford to take calculative risks now; just be more vigilant and check the creditworthiness of the project/firm before capitalizing your savings. If in a dilemma, you can opt to seek sound financial advice from some qualified and knowledgeable financial expert.

50.name: King of Cups
50.love: Love beckons and how! You may unexpectedly come in contact with an old crush at a community event or on a social networking platform.  It is said ‘Life can change at any moment’. That moment is now. You may see one of your close friends in a completely new perspective. You may just realize that what you had always thought to be a friendly emotion was actually love. Singles may find themselves attracted towards an elder or a much mature person; he could be a divorcee or a widower. You will find him very charismatic, influential and passionate. This person will help bring stability and peace in your life. Love life will get more exciting and adventurous. Yours is likely to be great relationship based on intellectual dexterity and mutual interestsThose already in a relationship shall enjoy a harmonious rapport. Your partner will propose marriage to you and you shall be more than eager to accept it. Some of you who had drifted away from each other due to personal engagements may now get in touch. You would yearn to reunite as the old feelings resurface. You are advised to weigh the pros and cons of the current situation before taking the final decision.
50.career: This is a time to relax and enjoy the outcome of your efforts. Your career is quite stable and successful at this point. You are ready to put in your best to reach newer heights in your professional life. You are very clear about your vision and purpose. You would enjoy what you do and this would be seen in form of excellent performance and results. Those employed can expect appreciation and rewards. A promotion to a high level or management position is likely. Relationships with colleagues and subordinates will improve. You shall get along well with your boss. He shall be more than pleased to help you in your endeavors. You can now focus on working smartly rather than on working hard. You shall get opportunities to arouse your creative side. Those in the fields of counseling, human resources, teaching, medicine or arts stand to benefit a lot. A wise and experienced mentor will appear to guide and help you shape your future. An influential person will help you in expanding your professional network and gaining more business. You can trust your gut feeling while making important business decisions – they shall prove very effective and productive. New projects and contracts shall keep coming in.
50.finance: Your wisdom shall help you earn well; though you lack the drive to push for material gains. You do not care much about money; yet you are now able to manage your funds in a much more mature manner. You shall not face many problems in your financial state of affairs; cash inflow will be good. You can now spend comfortably.  Nevertheless, you need to be reasonable in your expenditures. It would be wise to take a stock of the available monetary resources and maintain a budgetary plan of your expenses and income. You may be tempted to spend on luxuries; you can end up buying things which you do not actually need or use after all. Extravagant and emotional outgoings can reduce your reserves. You shall be quite magnanimous with your money. Spending for a good cause will give you great mental satisfaction and the Universe shall reciprocate in a substantial way. But be generous to the extent your pocket permits. It is wiser to keep a balance. You obviously do not want to get into debts. If in need of money, help may come in from an affluent relative or some inheritance. Businessmen can use diplomatic skills and acumen to get more business.

51.name: Ace of Swords
51.love: This is the time for new beginnings or renewals of relationships. If you are unattached or single, you can expect a new love to enter your life. Those already in a relationship may find themselves contradicting each other; one of the two may get very dominating or stubborn. This could result in disagreements, arguments and frustrations. The other partner will feel very insecure and at loss of what to expect from this strained relationship. If love still exists, the partners may try to give their alliance another chance. They may come up with unique, new ideas to bring back the spark in their relationship. It would be very important to be open and vocal about your feelings and expectations from your mate to make him understand your point of view. It is also possible that things have gone beyond repair. You both may feel that after all your issues cannot be resolved since you two have already started moving in different directions. You may have realized that you are better off without each other. In such a situation, it is wiser to part ways as soon as possible and avoid all the drama and discomfort associated with it. You shall be able to overcome this heartbreak soon; in fact, you would find yourself much happier and blissful.
51.career: You may come up with some brilliant idea that can either transform or revive a failed plan making it more viable and profitable.  You may be motivated by your new thoughts and ideas to move towards a new career and realize your dreams. You have all the requisites necessary for success – a sharper mind, strong decisive ability and above all, a focused determination. A salary increment, a promotion or some recognition in the form of a reward or appreciation is likely. You may be entrusted with greater responsibilities and prestigious projects. The unemployed may be offered a job of their liking and choice with an attractive pay package and perks. Some of you may venture in to an absolutely new field of work. Businessmen may come up with new inspiring concepts or inventions which may prove to be a revolutionary business model and a money spinner in the long run. Your brilliant ideas and original, resourceful ideas will attract many takers. You will find enough openings which will provide you opportunities to optimally utilize your creative and intellectual abilities. You may decide to sharpen your professional expertise further by joining some advanced educational courses. In this way, you shall be able to combine your valuable work experience with advanced knowledge in the best possible way.
51.finance: You financial future is shaping up well, promising you an enriched and comfortable life. A new beginning or a fruitful opportunity is foreseen. You may be promoted to a position when you can give vent to your resourceful concepts. The innovative thinkers will get a chance to present and implement their ideas. Your new proposals will find new takers and investors. You shall be able to accumulate money. You shall receive some good news – your loan application may be approved, you may get good returns on your securities, etc. You may spend on household purchases – a new house or a car. Nevertheless, you need to be prudent and practical in matters of finances. Do not let emotions influence your fiscal decisions. You may have to refuse a friend who asks you to advance him some money. Beware, if you lend, it is possible you shall not be repaid and you may lose a friend in the process. It is also a time to conserve your money and enhance your savings. Likewise, you need to keep away from risky ventures. You also need to guard against overspending as well as wasteful spending. Sudden contingencies such as sickness of a family member can drain away much of your funds.

52.name: Two of Swords
52.love: You may be unable to take a decision regarding a personal choice. It could be that you are attracted towards two different people and cannot bring yourself to choose between one of them. Both of them may be equally appealing. If you are in a relationship, you may come across some disturbing facts relating to your partner. But you may choose to ignore them in your blind love for him. You have probably made more than your share of sacrifices for the person you love. You need to guard your personal interests and maintain your dignity in the relationship. Some serious issues may be troubling you; it is advisable to have a sincere and frank talk with your partner and understand the status of your relation. Small differences may flare up into heated exchange of words. Ask yourself what is really important to you – continuing in a fragile relationship and bearing the pain or letting it go and moving ahead in life. It is possible your partner may not take kindly to you walking out of the relationship. Arguments, skirmishes and brawls are likely to follow. It is also possible that after the breakup, your partner may realize his true feelings for you and may attempt to revive the relationship. The choice is ultimately yours to make.
52.career: On the surface, everything may seem to be working smoothly. But there may be an undercurrent of conflicting ideas and doubts. Suspicion hangs in the air. You may be waiting for some clarity before taking an important decision or action. Don’t rush into things impulsively. You need to come forward with your ideas, doubts and fears; talk out openly and clearly. Only free and frank communication will help clear all uncertainties. Those looking for a job may be called for interviews by more than one employer or firm. You may be lacking the confidence to face the interviewing panel. You will have to trust yourself and be self-confident. You may be confused as to which of the firm you should join. You may take some time to find out more about the employers before you make the final choice.  The employed may have to face some trivial issues related to their work area. Too many options may confuse you.  But you are capable of coming up with practical solutions. If you are struggling with a particular decision, then it is advisable to follow your instincts. Some of you may be looking out for better alternatives to your current career. You are advised to consider all the pros and cons before leaving your existing employment/business.
52.finance: You are currently facing some serious financial issues and you just cannot wish them away. You will have to accept the reality and understand the gravity of the problem. You need to work towards maintaining a balance in your finances. Sticking to a preplanned budget would help you keep control over unnecessary expenditures. You should now concentrate on devising means and plans to increase your earnings and savings. You may have to compromise more than you did like to. Do not take any decision with doubts in your mind.  It is time to look out for alternative sources of income. Do not keep your assets blocked; make them earn for you. At the same time, be cautious and vigilant while making new investments. Two different choices may present themselves in the form of very attractive proposals. It is vital to conduct a thorough investigation of the available options and if necessary, obtain professional advice before putting in your hard earned money. Your financial judgment may not be sharp and accurate right now.  Get all the necessary information from the authentic sources. You are warned not to lend or borrow money. Traders need to be especially careful while selling merchandises on credit.

53.name: Three of Swords
53.love: You may experience difficult or painful times in your personal relationships. You may sense that your relationship is heading nowhere. One of you may have lost interest in the association or may be just too busy with other engagements to devote enough time to his/her partner. In the extreme case, infidelity can be a reason with a third person entering the scene. You may find it difficult to accept the situation and handle the pain of a separation. It could also be that your relationship has reached a point of stagnation and the mutual spark of love has now become extinct. The very thought of having to move away from someone whom you loved so deeply can be very shattering. You can try talking out things with your partner and attempt to salvage the relationship, if you can. But do not devote much time and energy if you sense that you have reached a dead end. Do not force yourself or your mate to continue in a loveless alliance. You must realize that there is no point in clinging to a dying relationship. It will only end in frustrations and sorrow. Do not try to hold on to your past; let it go. Destiny may have some better plans for you.
53.career: Things may not turn up the way you expected them to. You may have to face unanticipated problems at your workplace. You may become the target of some conspiracies, spiteful rumours or betrayals. Conflicts and angry battle of words are likely with coworkers. In such circumstances, you will have to be very diplomatic and tactful in your dealings with your colleagues and subordinates. You may try to talk to your senior to help sort out matters. The chances of pacifying the hostile atmosphere are, however, quite bleak. Counseling or meditation may help you in dealing with the situation to some extent.For some, the work conditions would deteriorate to the level that they may decide to quit. Think twice and take the decisive step only if you see an alternative on the horizon. Starting off something on your own would be a better option. Businessmen may have some serious issues with their partners. Pent up emotions may find way through arguments and skirmishes.  You may decide to part ways and go single. The key to this unsettle period is to just concentrate on your work without paying any heed to the inimical happenings around you. This could just be the darkest hour before the storm is over.
53.finance: Things are not very encouraging on the financial front. Loss of a job or contract can be the cause of a monetary crisis. Some bad news may herald difficult times to come. Limited income and unexpected outgoings may result in a tight situation. You may need to cut back on your spending and reduce your investments. Do not hesitate to ask for help and financial support from your near and dear ones. Do not lose faith in yourself; setbacks are a part of life. Take this opportunity to analyze the reasons why you got into this mess in the first place. Some wrong decisions taken, some mistaken moves – anything could be a reason. Let this be a lesson for future planning. Businessmen should play safe with their available resources. You may think about closing down a loss making unit or branch. Do not make any new financial commitments and try your best to fulfill the ones you have already made. Outstanding receivables may not be coming in; on the other hand, you may have committed to make some payments or start a new venture. In either case, you may feel stuck with no way out. You will have to deal with this difficult phase with utmost caution. This too will pass.

54.name: Four of Swords
54.love: This is the perfect time to take a break from relationships and spend some quality time with your own self. It is sometimes necessary to have some personal space in relations. You need to ask yourself who you really are and where does your real happiness lie. You may have been so much engaged in pursuing and maintaining your personal alliances that you have lost touch with your inner self. Spending some time in self-meditation will help clear many misconceptions you may be having regarding your partner or your relationships; it will also boost your self-worth and bring out your individuality. Those in a relationship may agree to separate temporarily to sort out things between them or to decide whether they want to continue in this affair further. It is very possible that your relationship strengthens after this hiatus. Those who are pursuing a new love interest need to relax and wait till the time is right. If you have just had a break up, utilize this time to rise above the pain and prepare yourself for a positive future. Lessons learnt from past relationships can provide a key to happiness in future associations. You may have to learn to say NO to certain things which you do not agree to.
54.career: This is the time of recovery and rejuvenation. You have just emerged from some difficult experiences and need to take some rest and recharge your energies. This break period will help you gain new insights and come up with innovative and fresh solutions. You can then take on new tasks with full force and vigor. Challenges will come; you will need to stay collected and relaxed to face them. Things are not looking very bright on the career front; progress is slow and results are taking time to show. This is a time to rely on your own intuitions and observations than on biased views of others. You may be on the outlook for a better career option. Take some time for retrospection. The employed are likely to face loss of job due to recession or layoffs in the time to come. They should start looking out for alternatives real quick or may have to remain without work for a long time. Trade may be slack. Businessmen need to pause and analyze their current situation before they burn themselves out. Only relaxation and rest will help churn out your creative juices and innovative ideas. Entrepreneurs and freelancers may consider trying out some new deviation from their main line work.
54.finance: Finances may not be looking quite good at present. Do not worry; very soon you shall be relieved of your monetary stress. It is time you pause, relax and re-assess your situation with a clear mind. You may need to redefine the areas of income and expenditures. You may have to change some old strategies and come up with new ideas of augmenting your income. You will have to follow up and pursue your debtors to pay up the dues. You may be tempted to try your luck in speculations; but it is advised to keep away from any such proposition. You should keep a control on your expenses till more money starts flowing in. Conserve your savings and do not make any new investments right now. Gradually, your perseverance and efforts will start showing results in the form of increased earnings and savings. You may get a lucrative job offer.  A much awaited increment in salary or a new project may be approved. Financial matters will become stable and you will have more cash to spend. You can now start preparing for new projects. Do not stress; focus on tapping alternative means of incomes. Economic success will follow.

55.name: Five of Swords
55.love: This is a period of conflicts – conflict with your own self or conflict with those whom you love and care for. Disagreements and difference of opinions may make the situation very tense. You may be frustrated when things don’t work the way you planned. The singles may feel exasperated by their loneliness.Clashes, emotional blackmail and possessiveness may weigh down your relationship. Trust and mutual respect may be missing. One of the partners may be unfaithful to the other. Before putting the blame on your partner, try to honestly analyze your own self and your role in the conflict. There is no point in intensifying the arguments unnecessarily when matters can be sorted out amicably. Arguing can be an utter waste of time; you may be dominated or out smarted by your mate.  You may feel exploited or pressurized in a relationship. It is time you calmly analyze your situation with an unbiased mind. Compromise if you must, but not at the cost of your dignity. You may have to take some tough decisions. A separation or a breakup may seem imminent.   The feeling of loneliness and betrayal may become overwhelming. But you need to learn from your past experiences and move on.
55.career: You may be passing through an unstable and frustrating phase in your career. An argument with your boss or a senior colleague can take an ugly turn.  You may become the victim of office politics; coworkers may conspire against you and try to tarnish your image. Instead of reacting angrily or impulsively, try to get to the crux of the problem. Only a calm and persistent approach will work. Instead of putting others down, give an ear to their suggestions; it may work for you. At the same time, do not hesitate to speak out when you are confident about your moves. Instead of finding faults in other, try to concentrate on correcting your own vices. It is time to devise new strategies and take corrective measures. You will have to come out of your comfort zone and take on new challenges; you may have to struggle, no doubt. But your competitiveness and take-charge attitude will pave way for a superior position or promotion. Businessmen will need to negotiate much with their clients and dealers. Arguments will only waste your time and money. This is the time when you can move ahead only with compromises. Do not try to handle all the issues lone handed; seek assistance and support. Networking would prove to be a boosting factor in your business.
55.finance: Financial status is not good right now. You may have to face economic hardships and troubles. The employed may lose their job or a source of income. Hasty and impulsive decisions at this time may result in losses. You may even be tricked or deceived in money matters. You may have to travel quite a lot for matters relating to work. Taking a stock of your overall financial situation will help pinpoint areas where improvements are possible. You need to prepare a new financial plan and stick to a balanced budget. Entrepreneurs may have to put in extra efforts to achieve the desired results. You will have to be conservative in your financial dealings. You may have to cut down not only on your expenses but also on your comforts and luxuries. Exercise restraint on your spending. Look out for new sources of earning incomes and savings. You can work some extra hours; or take up an additional job. Be cautious while dealing with legal documentation; understand all the clauses well before signing on the dotted line. Keep close tabs on your financial transactions; chances of a deceitful deal exists. Starting a new venture at this stage would be an unwise move.

56.name: Six of Swords
56.love: You may be passing through turbulent times in your relationships. You may find yourself drifting apart from your partner. You may even be thinking of ending your alliance. But do not rush into things. Have a heart to heart talk with your partner and try to understand the crux of the problem. It could just be that stagnation has set in with nothing new to share or enjoy. You may plan a trip or outing or even a simple dinner date – a change from the routine to re-ignite the spark between you two.However, those who have sensed the presence of a third person in their relationships or those who are in an abusive relationship may be forced to take a decisive step forward – for their own peace and mental tranquil or for a better future for their children. So a separation or a divorce is inevitable. It would be wiser to avoid dramatic battle of wits and words. The breakup will be painful; but the healing will be quicker. You may find a new partner. He/she will be an understanding and loving person who will help you overcome your past apprehensions and move ahead.
