You may even consider travelling or relocating to a new place to get over your past.
56.career: This is a transitory period in your career as you flutter from one thought to the other. Lately, you may have been dealing with too many issues. Be assured things will gradually fall in places. Instead of worrying incessantly, try to be patient and wait for the right time. Distancing yourself from the problems may help you to analyze the situation objectively. Instead scattering your energies in too many different directions, concentrate your mind on a single goal at a time. Be vocal about your concepts and choices if you want to be heard and appreciated. The employed may be facing some problems in their workplace; you may realize that there is hardly any scope of growth in your particular field of work or that your talents are not being optimally exploited. You may think of looking out for another job or may decide to change your occupation. A cool mind and clear thinking will help you decide as to which is the best course for you. Some of you may be transferred to a new branch or location which will prove to be a welcome change. You may even decide to put your long thought-out innovative ideas into action. Businessmen will be busy travelling for work.
56.finance: Your financial status is expected to improve gradually in a positive way. This would be able to reduce your stress to some extent. The troubles are not over yet; still, you can heave a sigh of relief. The unemployed may find occupations which pay well. You may be offered a job abroad with better pay and perks package. Money will start trickling in. Be cautious of how you invest this cash. You shall be able to repay a part of your loans or debts. It is time your realized the importance of maintaining a balanced budget and a contingency fund. Businessmen will be able to bring some order to the existing financial chaos. You would get a chance to retrace your steps towards making profits. You may need to re-strategize your plans if the earlier ones didn’t work well. Adapting yourself to the changing times and demands may prove to be a good move. Concentrate on increasing your savings; do not splurge on unnecessary expenditures. Also keep away from speculation and high-risk investments. You may however allow yourself some luxury of taking a short break or a much need vacation. This will only help in rejuvenating your mental faculties which will help your make a fresh start.

57.name: Seven of Swords
57.love: You are cautioned of a deception or a parting in a relationship. Things may appear to be smooth on the surface; but treachery may be brewing underneath. It is very vital to be honest about your feelings – both to yourself and to your partner. You may find out that you are being stalked or someone may be trying to intrude in your private life. If you're looking for love, you may meet someone interesting now. But be wise to find out everything about that person before you proceed in the relationship. He/she may be hiding something from you or may have some ulterior motives in befriending you. At the same time, do not shoo off a genuine suitor.  Follow your intelligence and instincts.Those already in a committed relationship need to trust their partners. If you have a reason to feel suspicious then it would be wiser to talk over the issue rather than being silent or aggressive about it. It is important that you spend some quality time with each other; this would provide the much needed confidence and assurance required in your relationship. Those who may have decided to walk out from a relationship may be finding it difficult to forget their love.
57.career: A sort of negativity is in the air. Things are not as they appear to be. You cannot trust anyone. Use your own senses and intuitions to understand the situation and take action accordingly. This is the time to take up challenges. The unemployed may seek help of family and friends to get the necessary contacts. Do not forget it is a competitive world out there.  Prepare yourself thoroughly, keep your documents and certificates filed and up to date. Above all, use your imagination and communication skills to face the interviews confidently. This will ensure success in getting a good job. Those already employed need to be very vigilant as the office atmosphere may not be very favorable. Be very systematic and efficient in your tasks. Do not allow any room for mistakes; double check your work if necessary. Someone may try to disrupt your work or take credit for your success. Do not let envious colleagues affect your professional attributes. Keep away from office politics. You may need to be more bold or daring. Use your intelligence, convincing communication skills and quick thinking to move ahead; do not try any unethical approach. Beware of a partner trying to cheat you in business dealings and accounts.
57.finance: You need to be very cautious and watchful in financial dealings. You may have to make some difficult choices relating to money matters.  You may lose money or may be cheated by someone.  There may be delays in recovery of past dues. It is advisable not to lend money to anyone; you may not be able to recover it. Also keep away from unethical and illegal ways of making money. Do not discuss your fiscal plans with others.  Secure your finances in safe places, deposits or ventures. It would be prudent to investigate thoroughly before taking on a new project or committing to a new deal. Do not be tricked into signing any document. The businessmen may have to take quick decisions regarding monetary transactions; you may have to make a choice between gigantic gains and your reputation.  Be careful not to compromise on your honesty and integrity in a bid to earn more profits. You may have to face problem with your employees who are not trustworthy and may have a hidden agenda. Be particularly aware of all the business proceedings and remain vigilant. Keep away from speculations of all sorts. Do not be enticed by tempting schemes which promise too high rates of returns for a small investment.

58.name: Eight of Swords
58.love: This may be a phase of troubled personal equations. If you are new in a relationship, watch out for any symptoms of dictatorial or abusive behavior. It is not a wise decision to put up with a violent partner even for love. Your partner may try to cheat you.  The married too may feel trapped in their relationship. Nothing seems to be working right for the two of you. One of you would be trying to dominate and control the other. Your partner may be looking for a relationship without any commitments or responsibilities; whereas you may be dreaming of a life together. You may be loving him too much to think of leaving him. This may lead to frustration, bitterness and uncertainties. Surely, there is an urgent need to re-analyse your relationship before it turns toxic. Some of you may actually not want to continue in this affair; but having become habituated to this person makes it difficult for you to call it quits. This may have negative repercussions on your mental and emotional health. You will have to understand that being single is a better alternative to having a distressed alliance. You can seek the support of a family member, a friend or a counselor to help you take a final decision and get over this troubled period.
58.career: You may be passing through a very confusing phase in your career. Excessive thinking and analyzing may blur your decisions and ways of working. You may be looking out for a new job; but may not be confident while giving interviews. Your mind may be full of doubts and pessimistic ideas. You may be facing some issues at your workplace too. It is possible that you may be bypassed at the time of promotions. This will make you feel sidelined. But the reality is that you had put your energies in so many different tasks and directions that your own work suffered. You may feel that you are being ill-treated by your superiors and colleagues; while the truth is that you yourself do not trust anyone. You may be thinking too much in depth about a situation which may not occur after all! It is the fear of the untrodden path which is holding you back. Too much of self-doubt and self-criticism will only make you a defeatist. You need to calm down and focus on your work so that you are able to give the best results. Only hard work, optimistic outlook and hopefulness can help bring you out of this mess. Look out for the right opportunities and make the best of them.
58.finance: You may be feeling trapped in a financial crisis right now. The debts are rising, investments are taking time to yield good returns, clients are turning back – nothing seems to be working right for you. A new line of business or a contract may have boomeranged. The circumstances are such that you find it difficult to trust anyone or anything; you doubt your own abilities and talents. The reality is that you may be seeing things from an exaggerated perspective. Don’t jump to conclusions and avoid taking impulsive decisions. It is time to calm down and think rationally. Do not use threats or force to recover your dues; a gentler approach would be more fruitful. Adopt some sensible ways to cut the expenses and increase your income. Budgeting and meticulous planning would prove to be the solutions to your monetary problems. It would be wise to seek the advice of experts to manage your finances.  Avoid taking new contracts or making fresh commitments till things are stable. A hobby turned profession, a creative pursuit, extended hours of work, etc. may help in opening up new sources of income. You may sell off an expensive personal asset which you may not have used since a long time.

59.name: Nine of Swords
59.love: This may be a testing time for relationships. If you have recently got into a new love affair, be cautious. Cracks of differences may start appearing. It is possible you had an exaggerated opinion of your mate which is now fading away. Even those who may have been long into an alliance may find themselves arguing over trivial issues. There are chances of your partner cheating on you or leaving you for good. It is not that he would be very happy with the breakup either. But things were meant to go this way. Surrounding yourself with friends and family can be the best way to deal with your loneliness. Forgive, forget and move on. It is also possible that you are overstressing yourself over trivial issues. Small differences of opinions may be seen as signs of disloyalty by you. Your partner may be seeking some personal time and space for himself and this may be viewed by you as a sign of infidelity. The fear of a breakup may give you nightmares. The reality may not be so bad after all. In such situation, it is important that your see the reality and look for practical and rational solutions to your relationship issues.
59.career: This period is not very good for your career. The unemployed may have concerns about getting a job; the employed may feel insecure about retaining their position. You may have to manage a problematic situation at work single handedly; results may not match up to your expectations and efforts. You may find yourself in the midst of a pile of responsibilities and hurdles. A sudden unexpected problem at work place could be the cause of stress. To add to it, your pessimist attitude will refuse to look out for solutions around you. Lack of confidence and low esteem could lead to taking wrong decisions leading to further anxiety and exasperation. Sometimes plans may fail for reasons beyond our control and understanding. Many of your fears may be unfounded or too trivial to brood about. You need to see reason and confront your fears and limitations. Excessive worrying will only scare you. Do not be harsh on yourself. You need to overcome your pessimistic thinking and lack of confidence; face the future with conviction. Be ready and prepared to take risks. Worrying won’t help; focus on your resources and abilities. Do not hesitate to seek help from your coworkers.
59.finance: This period may find you in a financial disarray. Money matters are going to be complex and time-consuming. Overheads are rising, incomes are falling, debts are piling. Business may be going down. The state of affairs does seem very depressing. But the reality may be a wee bit different. The situation may not be that gory after all. Excessive brooding and improper planning are the main problems that are weighing you down. Most of your fears are unrealistic. Improvements can and will surely happen if your set aside your fears and put in the best of your resources and efforts.You need to calm down and then take a proper stock of the situation. Yes, you have debts to clear and payments to be made.  But borrowing or taking loans for repayment is surely not the answer. There may be an untapped resource which has missed your attention. Be smart and resourceful in cutting down expenses. Look around for new ways of creating additional earnings. However, keep away from speculations and get-rich-quick schemes. Do not be dragged into expensive legal disputes; try to talk your way out and ask for some time to set things right.

60.name: Ten of Swords
60.love: You may be passing through an emotionally difficult phase. Despite your best efforts to keep your relationship going, nothing seems to work. You must realize that things have now gone beyond repair. No amount of efforts, sacrifices, or imploring shall be able to mend things; your trust has been broken. There is nothing left in this relationship. Yet you may try to cling to it in a desperate hope of reviving it. This is surely not a pleasant situation to be in. It is important for you to stay strong. Moving away from the concerned person and everything related to him/her could be a good beginning. Destiny wants you to be happy and come out of the cocoon of heartache and sorrow. Have faith that the worst is over; a new beginning is about to happen. You have learnt your Karmic lesson. It’s time to walk ahead with your head held high. Be careful not to divulge the details of your heart break to unreliable friends and acquaintances. They shall not sympathize with you; but only have fun on your account. Seek help and company of your loved ones – close family and friends who will understand you and help you get over your past.
60.career: You are at that point in your career where an old chapter closes and a new one is about to open. Nothing is certain at this moment. All you can experience is fear, anxiety and insecurity. You may have been struggling to get a job or a promotion – which is just not happening. Those employed may be fearing loss of job due to retrenchment policies of the company or some other reason.  It would be wise to start looking out for alternatives for such a situation. You may feel you have been wronged by your boss or your colleagues. There is no point wasting time arguing or explaining. Contracts may not be renewed. Business may be declining to a point where it is difficult to cover even the costs. Of course, this is not at all a pleasant situation to be in. The wise thing would be to just move on. Understand that you have to close this episode of your life. Remember nothing can get worse than this. It is time to get back to your feet. Don’t waste your time brooding over the past. Reassess your available resources, search for the right opportunities and do not hesitate to seek assistance whenever and wherever required.
60.finance: Financial instability will make your life unsettled. Wrong judgments and faulty decisions taken in the past may now show up in the form of sudden and devastating losses. A change in State policies, an investment gone wrong, a cancelled or rejected assignment – anything can be a reason. You may have lost a job or a project may have ended abruptly. You could have been the victim of somebody else’s wrongdoing. The crux of this fiscal debacle could be that you did not handle your finances well enough. Let this be a lesson for you. There is no point in crying over the spilt milk. You have nothing more to lose.The first thing you ought to do is to immediately cut down the unnecessary expenses and costs. This is not a time to undertake a new venture. It’s time to take a stock of your current resources and liabilities. Determine afresh your financial goals. Plan out a strategy which is realistic and attainable. See this as a new beginning where the only way forward is up. Consider this as an opportunity to do what you always dreamt or thought of doing. Be patient and things will surely improve. A long trip may prove to be very auspicious.

61.name: Page of Swords
61.love: Your search for the right person may just end. You may be attracted to someone younger or someone much older to you. You are more likely to be attracted to his intellect than to his appearances. This person is likely to be a very friendly, intelligent and an interesting character. Be communicative and vocal about your feelings if you want your relationship to take off on a serious note. Shying away will lead you nowhere. Newlyweds may plan a romantic trip and enjoy some fulfilled quality time with each other. Some disagreements and skirmishes with your partner are likely. Do let this blow up into a big spat. Your partner may only be asking for some personal space in the relationship. Heart to heart talks will not help you understand each other better, but shall help take your relationship to a deeper level. Strong passions will help strengthen the bond further.Some good news is on its way. It could be related to conception or birth of a child, a new relationship, a close friend wanting to meet you after a long time. The elderly couples may experience a surge of energy in their relationships. You may decide to go for a second honeymoon.
61.career: This period will have a major impact on your future. The unemployed will get a very promising opening. Good news may come in the form of an appointment letter. The employed may have to face new challenges and tricky situations.  You may have to handle a difficult state of affairs single handedly.  Analyze the problem well, study it from different angles and you will surely come up with an innovative way of dealing with it. The whole process will prove to be a learning experience for you. If you have been thinking of a career change for some time now, this is the time to go ahead with it. Fresh graduates may consider opting for a skill enhancement course or an internship to gain work experience. Entrepreneurs are going to be very busy. New money making opportunities will come up. It is time for some action. Get a lot of information, sort out facts, meet people and negotiate. But do not promise what you cannot deliver. This is definitely not a good time to go in for new ventures or make major commitments. Seniors and experienced professionals will be able to help you in sorting out your problems.  They shall be instrumental in getting new contracts and contacts.
61.finance: Financial status may remain unstable. You need to be very cautious in money matters in this period. Take significant decisions only after carefully considering all the aspects of the situation.  Be very thorough with your work; keep your books updated. A small error may cost you a lot. Getting advice from a financial expert would be a good idea. You may have to deal with small glitches such as bouncing of a cheque, delays in delivery of goods, etc. Be honest in all your dealings. Do not disclose or discuss your fiscal matters with others. You may be very eager to put your ideas and plans into action. But time is not ripe; you may have to wait for some more time. Be forewarned; a deceitful person may try to mislead you in financial matters. You may have to clear some medical bills or may have to spend unnecessarily on legal issues and court matters.  You can come up with some brilliant ideas for cutting costs and increasing your savings. Do not rely upon luck factor in financial matters. Only hard and persistent efforts will bring in the desired rewards. Keep checking your correspondence regularly; good news may arrive.

62.name: Knight of Swords
62.love: You would be very spontaneous and active in your social life. You would be very flirtatious. Few would dare say “no” to your magnetic appeal. You would have many suitors vying for your attention. If you are looking out for a new love, learn to express yourself in a more eloquent way; meet people, pay attention to your grooming and be at your best. You will surely get lots of attention. Do not be hasty or impulsive in starting a new relationship. Someone interesting will sweep you off your feet with his demeanor and charming manners. You might meet someone special in the midst of some chaotic circumstances. You may even be harassed or followed incessantly by someone you don’t approve of. If you are a male, you know very well how to allure your love interest with your intelligent talks and penetrating eyes. Those already in a relationship need to guard against being too opinioned or egoistic in their personal equations. Avoid arguments with your partners; it may flare into a heated and ugly debate. Your mate may behave in a rather erratic manner and you will find yourself short of patience to put up with his idiocies. A partner may have to move away from you for some time.
62.career: Your goals are set; resources are assembled and you are raring to go. This period will find you intensely motivated towards your career. You are ready to confront challenges head-on. Being an extremely ambitious person, you have clearly visualized your desired outcome and would settle for nothing less than undiluted success. You are not ready to rest till you reach the top. But in this pursuit of success, you are likely to get so self-centered that you may ignore even those who have stood with you in the days of struggle. If you are looking for a promotion, you may have to work hard at a faster pace and get ahead past many contenders for the post. Time and tide waits for none. It’s time for you to grab the opportunities as they present themselves and surge ahead. Keep your eyes and ears open. Try to complete your projects meticulously and before the given deadline. In fact, put in that little extra effort which will stand out as your USP. Entrepreneurs need to complete their planning and strategizing and should now concentrate full time on implementing their ideas. Time is right for businessmen to launch a new line of business or open a new branch. Be quick but not impatient. Do not take decisions on an impulse.
62.finance: You can experience a sudden and welcome change in your fortune. This is the time of abundance. Some positive news is on its way. You shall remain financially versatile and flexible with money pouring in from various sources. You can surely expect sudden extra cash coming in. It can be in the form of an increment in salary, an unexpected bonus or perk, an inheritance or some other kind of windfall gain. You may even win prizes and rewards in competitions. You may also recover debts you had long written off as unrecoverable. This will boost your purchasing power and confidence as well. You will now be more outgoing and willing to spend on your family and friends as well as for charitable purposes. Business and investments will yield good returns. It is advisable to plough back your profits in the existing business itself instead of investing in new areas. You can invest your extra gains in sound securities; but be careful not to place all your eggs in the same basket. Professionals in the fields of teaching, counseling or consulting shall see a boost in their income and wealth. You may purchase a new vehicle to facilitate conveyance. You may, however, need to curb your impulse to overspend.

63.name: Queen of Swords
63.love: Though you shall be in a very emotional state of mind, the way you behave will project you as a cold hearted person. You are not able to give the required time and attention to your personal relations due to your engagement in career pursuits. You need to relax as now is the time to be expressive with your feelings. You are more likely to be drawn more towards a strong, trustworthy and loyal partner rather than a beautiful blockhead. It would be wise to be vocal about your preferences and priorities before getting into a serious relationship. Clear and honest exchange of ideas will be able to prevent many misunderstandings in the future. At the same time, do not try to force or dominate your companion.  You may come across an interesting person from artistic or creative field. A close friend may propose to you. If already in a relationship, let the going be smooth. Enjoy quiet times with your beloved. Your partner may want to be intimate with you; but you may be holding yourself back waiting for him to make the first move. You may be expecting too much from your mate. You need to be less practical and more emotional in your personal interactions.
63.career: Work responsibilities and pressures are likely to increase. This is the time to single-mindedly focus on your career and your long term objectives. Do not let personal issues shadow an oncoming opportunity or block your career progress. It is time to get more organized and responsible. Be clear of your goals and seek to optimally utilize the means to achieve them. You would be able to win over coworkers and clients with your effective and superb communication skills. You need to be level headed and practical minded in your approaches to tackle the issues in your professional life. Emotional thinking will only distort your understanding of the given circumstances and may even complicate matters for you. Your boss may be in a very demanding mood; he may have unreasonable expectations from you. You may feel pressurized and vulnerable. Be careful and avoid making mistakes. Creative pursuits would prove to be quite stimulating and you would be able to give your best performance. Your sharp analytical skills and powerful intuition shall help you overcome the hurdles and emerge a winner. An elderly wise woman will mentor you and help you to take the right decisions. You may consider enhancing your abilities and income by going in for further studies or taking a skill development course.
63.finance: Your hard work will pay off and you shall be more than adequately compensated for it. You may be slowly recovering from a recent loss made in a business venture or an investment gone wrong. You have learnt your lessons and are very vigilant in your financial affairs. Do not let your past apprehensions prevent you from taking the right risks in the present. Trust your instincts and be clear of your objectives. Do not lose sight of the minute details. Prudent budgeting and cautious planning will help conserve and multiply your monetary resources. You may come up with creative ideas of enhancing your income. An additional source of income may open up. You may spend some amounts on home renovation or improvements. Commercial dealings will be smooth as you will learn new tips and tricks to manage your business and finances. You shall be able to avail of the sound advice of an experienced, knowledgeable person, most probably a woman, in your financial matters. It would be judicious to take fiscal decisions based on your logic and facts rather than on your emotions. You may have to deal with and solve issues related to inheritance, legacies or joint family issues.

64.name: King of Swords
64.love: A new person may enter your life. He may be of a serious and stubborn disposition. His forthrightness may not go down well with you. Avoid getting aggressive in your personal relationships. A failed or a jilted relationship will bother you no end; it will take some time for you to get back to your old normal self. You will have very high expectations from your partner. You will need to be more vocal and demonstrative of your love.Teenage students may have a crush on their professors. The employed may fall in love with a colleague or a mentor. Youngsters may be highly infatuated by a strong, influential and opinionated person. However do not let yourself be taken advantage of or mistreated. The matured may be attracted towards someone who is very intelligent quick witted. He may certainly be a very intriguing person. You seek to connect both intellectually and spiritually in your relationship. A long distance relationship is also indicated. This person will be older than you either in age or worldly experience. He/she may belong to a different culture and lifestyle altogether. You may be put off by an overbearing or a dominant partner
64.career: This is the time to put your wisdom and past experience to the best possible use. You shall be able to make a mark of your dexterity in your chosen profession. You will achieve power and position and also suffer the jealousy of your coworkers. Promotions will bring along greater and tougher responsibilities. Assistance will not be forthcoming. Colleagues will not be cooperative. You will have to be more accommodating and polite with your subordinates else you will have to handle all the stress and difficulties alone. Smooth talk, congenial behavior and a bit of compromising will help get the work done. Do not be obstinate and avoid conflicts with your coworkers and boss. Aggressiveness will only spoil matters for you. You may become a victim of conspiracies and blamed for no fault of yours. You should use your powerful vocabulary and excellent communication skills to tilt the balance in your favor. Be diplomatic in your dealings with your customers to get the desired results and actions. Businessmen need to stay clear from any kind of unethical or illegal transactions. Stick to the right and honest path and you have nothing to fear. Your scrupulousness and perseverance will eventually be rewarded in a big way.
64.finance: Financial status is not very encouraging. A much awaited increment may take some more time to come through. You will have to be frugal in spending and may even have to cut down some of your expenses. Budgeting will not only help you in maintaining a balance of your incomes and assets but also aid in curtailing unnecessary outlays. Those in counseling or teaching services stand to benefit financially.Keep your legal documents and financial accounts up to date. Be cautious while dealing with legal issues relating to money matters such as outgoings, overheads or workers reimbursements. It would be better if you keep yourself abreast of the changing market trends and latest financial laws. Read objectively all the clauses before signing any document. There are chances that somebody might try to lure you to invest in a get-rich-quick scheme which promises lucrative returns. You may take the counsel of a professional solicitor or a financial adviser. Your resources and wealth will be safer with their advice considering that soon you shall be seeing a surge in your earnings. Investments would definitely yield good returns; a little philanthropy on the side would do a lot more good for your conscience.

65.name: Ace of Pentacles
65.love: You shall make new friends and associations based on common pursuits and interests. Your relationships shall see new beginnings. It could mean a new love affair or making a refreshingly new beginning within an ongoing relationship. The singles may find love in their professional circle. You may come across someone interesting and attractive at your new workplace or in a business association. An ex may re-enter your life and your feelings for him may be rekindled. You would now find many more things in common and in sync. You are ready to experience pure love and bliss in your association. Current relationships shall improve. You shall be able to strength the bonds of affection and togetherness. You shall bask in the cozy security and stability of your relationship. Finance and material solidarity shall play a very important role in your personal equations. You may decide to go in for a business partnership with your beloved or spouse. Married couples shall experience a renewal of emotions. They may plan a second honeymoon to a choice destination or make important domestic purchases such as a house, a car, etc. They may also decide on starting a family. Some of you may be rejoiced by the birth of a child.
65.career: This is a time for new beginnings and new opportunities. You shall see a steady growth and success in your career. You are now in a much more relaxed mood. The unemployed shall be happy to get a very lucrative job offer. The interns/trainees may be offered a permanent job. Those in employment may be assigned a more responsible position or a new project of their liking which will give them immense satisfaction. You shall get an opportunity to display your yet-not-known talents and aptitudes to others. Your new groundbreaking ideas shall be accepted and appreciated by all. You shall come up with innovative solutions to work-related complications. You may even opt to learn and develop new work skills. Businessmen may start a new venture or establish a secure foundation of their firm. This is an opportune time to put their energies, talents, time and whatever resources they have at their disposal, to the best possible use. Using practical common sense and being realistic shall be helpful in achieving the set targets. You may work towards turning your dreams into reality. Do not keep your funds idle. Investment in risky ventures shall yield good returns. Assets and profits shall rise. Your plans and actions should now be motivated towards attaining prosperity and abundance.
65.finance: This period marks the beginning of richness and prosperity. Good news is on the way. New opportunities shall bring in material success. You can expect more money on hand due to a new job, a promotion, a perk, etc. Unexpected and sudden gains are not ruled out either. You may be the beneficiary of some gift or a legacy or some inheritance. You shall now be in a comfortable position to make some desirable and large purchases. It is time to share your abundance and happiness with your near and dear ones.This is the best time to implement your long thought out plans and work towards realizing your objectives. Lucrative financial opportunities shall come your way. For those in self-employment or business, cash flow will be good and you shall see a growth in your financial status and business. Sales and profit margins shall reach new levels. All your debts shall be cleared. You may now invest in new ventures and schemes.  Savings and wise investments shall see your financial abundance multiply. You may also feel the urge to share your new found wealth with the less fortunate ones. Whatever you give to the needy, the Universe gives back to you manifold.

66.name: Two of Pentacles
66.love: Finance and economic issues are likely to play a pivotal role in your personal relationships. The singles may be facing a dilemma of making a choice of the right partner. They may opt for one with a sound pecuniary background. Those in a relationship may feel dejected due to the rising demands of their mate; it could be that their partner is financially draining them or is demanding too much of their time and attention. You two may be too busy in your professional lives to spend any private moments with each other. It would not be wise to neglect your love life for your career. Your partner may be pressing you for commitment. Do not give in if you are not ready. Remember a lot of time and energy is to be invested for maintaining a lasting relationship. Your love interest or spouse may find himself attracted to someone else too. He may yet be undecided about with whom he wants to continue in the relationship. This may make you feel very insecure and rightfully so. You may need to talk out things with each other and try to give more attention to developing and strengthening your relationship. It is also possible everything is fine between you two; yet you are facing some hectic and excited moments due to the birth of twins!
66.career: This period spells of multitasking and a very busy schedule. You have your fingers in too many pies. You are performing a perfect balancing act of managing things in different directions and trying out different approaches to keep the work going. Just be careful that you do not burn yourself out in the process. The employed may take up an additional job or start out with a new venture along with their current work. You may also turn your hobby into a part time job. You are going through a period of some major changes. It is also possible that you may be entrusted with two responsibilities at work. Despite all pressures, you shall remain contented and optimistic. Businessmen may be in two minds whether to undertake a risky venture or not. Time is ripe to seize opportunities and take risks. This is one of the busiest phases in your career in recent time. Partnerships and business alliances would work very well and earn huge profits.  You shall now decide to concentrate on promoting your business on a wider scale to bring in more revenues. You may get quite busy and shall have to juggle work with family life.
66.finance: You are an ambitious person and you know well how to make money earn more money for you. This is a time to keep all your finances in circulation. Do not hoard any cash. Even if there is some fiscal crunch, you shall be able to overcome it with your determination and hard work. You may resort to taking up additional jobs or assignments to tide over the economic crisis. Avoid borrowing from one to pay another. The employed may look out for additional sources of income. Students may work as trainees or apprentices to earn additional pocket money or to finance a further course of study. Those in business need to keep their inventory cycle moving; else they may have to face a financial setback. Small investors and self-employed professionals can take risk and start a new project which will prove to be profitable in the long run. Do not be put off by the initial glitches. If the situation gets tough, you just need to cut down on your unnecessary overheads. Investments in the right schemes can help to double your moneys. It is essential to seek expert professional help in these matters. Stockbrokers and those involved in speculation shall have a field day.

67.name: Three of Pentacles
67.love: This is a very positive period for personal relationships. The singles may find themselves much sought-after with more than one suitor wooing for their attention. It is very likely you may find your love interest at your workplace or on a social media platform. If you had been interested in someone for quite some time, he may notice you and even reciprocate your feelings in an encouraging way. Do not rush into the relationship. Be patient, take your time and enjoy the attention. Those already in a relationship may find their mutual fondness growing. Your joint efforts shall succeed in laying a solid foundation of your permanent relationship. You may decide to seal this bond with commitment and marriage. You can start consolidating and conjoining finance to purchase your own house. The married shall enjoy conjugal bliss. You may decide to start a family venture so that you two could be together for most of the time. You shall be a part of many family functions and group activities.  Someone in the family may need your counsel or advice.  Watch out for an outsider trying to enter your realm. He or she may not necessarily be a love interest; it could just be some relative or friend who may interfere with your personal equations.
67.career: This is a very positive period as far as career is concerned.  This is the time to work as a team and move ahead in coordination with others. Combined efforts will result in achieving goals successfully and before the deadline. You may draw a strategy to make the optimum use of the available resources and the skills of your creative coworkers. Those who are looking for new openings will find a suitable job of their stature. Your talents shall be recognized and rewarded. Ambitions shall soar and you shall show excellent results. Do not forget to give due credit to those who helped you reach this mark.It would be prudent to remain calm and collected in business dealings. Do not rush into things. If you are thinking of starting a new venture, be sure that you have worked out your plans and tactics well. You have all the competence and skills required to be a successful entrepreneur.  Businessmen shall be able to overcome all challenges and beat all competitions in their profession. You may lay the foundation of an ambitious project. At this point of time, job satisfaction matters more to you than the economic returns. Partnerships shall be very successful.
67.finance: This is the beginning of a comfortable financial period. Of course, you will have to work for it. The good news is that you shall be more than compensated for your efforts. You shall make a fortune by your own doing. Students may get good opportunities to learn and earn as interns. Communication and creativity shall play a major role in promoting your work. You shall be able to put your talents and labors to the best possible use which will bring you much appreciation and increments. This is a good time to initiate new ventures, take on new orders or assignments and come up with innovative ideas to make more money. Sales shall rise; so shall your profits. New entrepreneurs may seek loan from financial institutions which shall be approved without any fuss or delay. Group activities, collaborations and partnerships shall yield good returns. A challenging task may turn out to be a golden opportunity of substantial gains. Time is also ripe for making some structural changes in your business or workplace. You may purchase new machineries or technical equipment or some new property for office, warehouse, etc. investments in real estate shall prove profitable. However, keep away from speculations and risky undertakings.

68.name: Four of Pentacles
68.love: You may be too busy in your economic pursuits to pay much attention to your personal life. If you let yourself be enclosed in a cocoon of your own material world, you may deny yourself the opportunity of meeting interesting people.  Obstacles and diversions may prevent you getting close to your beloved; but your determination can surely help overcome all barriers. Young couples shall concentrate on accumulating resources for a happy married life in the future. Those already in a relationship need to guard against being too clingy or insecure about their partner. He may feel suffocated and attempt to move out of the relationship. Do not try to be too dominating or controlling in your relationship. Those in an established relationship may sense an imbalance of feelings or behavior. They may suspect that their partner is hiding something from them. It is also possible that though you are putting in your best efforts in the relationship, you are not getting the same vibes from your partner. You may end up feeling very neglected and lonely. The married too may feel left out in their relationship by their partner who may be busy chasing his individual dreams. You may put up a happy face in public; but in reality, you may be working really hard to make the relationship work.
68.career: You have made good beginnings and now it is the time to amalgamate all your efforts and focus all your energies towards successful completion of the ongoing projects. No doubt, you are a smart worker. Nevertheless, you need to bring some changes in your perspective to accommodate the views of others too. A little cooperation will surely do well for the achievement of your targets.  Those employed need to review their status in the company they are working for. You may seek better options or a new employment to tap your latent talents and aptitudes. The unemployed may find many lucrative openings. Do not be lured by tall promises. Conduct a thorough investigation before submitting your resume. This is the time to focus on solidifying your material issues. You need to consolidate and conserve your resources. It would not be wise to lend out money at this stage.  Businessmen need to be careful of competitors and rivals trying to usurp or sabotage their plans. Invest your money in secure, profit making ventures only.  You may adopt a new technology which will save both costs and energy. Try to settle issues with your business associates and partners amicably. One of the partners may resist new ideas or decisions.
68.finance: Financial security and stability are of great significance at this point of time. Advancement in career and business has made your fiscal status comfortable. Your career goals have been achieved and material returns pour in now. Nonetheless, you need to be thrifty in your spending and try to conserve your resources. You may resort to meticulous budgeting for maintaining a balance in your savings and wealth. You shall find yourself very ambitious and motivated to secure money for an assured future. You may end up being too stingy about money. Material possessions shall rule your life. You may be too busy involved in making and hoarding money.Businessmen shall enjoy financial stability with their reserves secured in safe investments. However, this is definitely not a time to make new investments. You need to focus now on framing long term plans and setting new goals. This is a good time for saving and planning for the future. Finances shall grow consistently if capitalized in an appropriate manner. You shall be adequately rewarded for your efforts.  If desirous of starting a new venture, you may go ahead with the assurance of earning good long term profits. Real estate deals shall prove to be very lucrative.

69.name: Five of Pentacles
69.love: This is not a happy time for personal relationships.  You may feel lonely and ignored. The feeling of not being desirable any more may overwhelm you.  You may experience a sudden stormy change in your relationship. You may have many unanswered questions and this will bother you no end. You need to maintain your inner peace to get over this turbulent period. This is not an appropriate time to propose or declare your love.  You may have to face rejection.  Those already in a relationship may see many ups and downs. Hold on to your perseverance; it may see you through and you may merge a stronger couple. A break in the relationship is also possible. You have been relying a lot on your mate and may now find yourself stranded and lost. The fact that he has moved on to find happiness elsewhere may also bother you immensely. It is also possible that you have suffered a lot in your association and have now decided that enough is enough. You may finally decide to walk out from this painful relationship, no matter how hurt you may feel.  At this point, it would be wise to keep to yourself. Let your family and close friends be your support system.
69.career: This is a period of uncertainty and fluctuations.  All doesn’t seem well on the career front; this may be a period of hardship.  The work load may increase or become cumbersome. You may feel jammed at a point with no solution on the horizon nor any path to go further. Business partnerships may break down. You may feel isolated. Your job may be in jeopardy. You may be asked to choose between a lower pay package and resignation from the firm. Do not hesitate to seek help and advice from others.  A close family member or friend may help you to make a right choice or at least stand up to your problems. Take all the appropriate actions to improve your situation. Try to adapt yourself to the changed circumstances. Do not let this testing time overwhelm you.  You need to maintain your self-confidence. Understand that sometimes we find ourselves in unpredictable situations not because of our own doings; but due to some external forces which are beyond our control. You need to review your goals and make the best possible use of the available resources.  This will help to minimize the damage. Do not give up easily; be persistent. This too will pass.
69.finance: This is an unstable period as far as finances are concerned. You are likely to experience substantial economic setbacks. You may need to review your fiscal status, as soon you are going to face some financial problems.  You may lose a job or be prepared to accept a lower pay package.  May be you will have to do without the perks that you have been enjoying till now. In case you are unemployed, ask friends and family for contacts and references. This is the time to focus entirely on stabilizing your incomes and savings. Be stringent in expenditures. You may use your latent skills or a hobby to earn money. Businessmen need to guard and use their reserves very diligently to avoid bankruptcy.  Orders and customers may trickle down. Dwindling finances may lead to anxiety and anxiety may lead to financial mistakes. So it is important that you maintain a calm head while taking vital decisions.  If necessary, do not hesitate to seek some financial help or expert advice to bail you out. This is definitely not an appropriate time to make new investments. Steer clear of all kinds of speculations and risky schemes, howsoever tall the promises. Also avoid large purchases for the time being. Take heart, this is a temporary phase.

70.name: Six of Pentacles
70.love: Relationships will be good; but there will be an undercurrent of imbalance in the personal equations. One of the partners may try to dictate the other. It is advisable to keep ego and dominance away from your relationship. Try to maintain a balance; only then shall you be able to enjoy the warmth of the union. You may decide to move to the next level in your relationship. You would enjoy things done together – be it a creative activity or simple daily chores. The single are likely to be introduced to someone interesting in their social circle. He would be a caring and benevolent person. His positivity and demeanor will sweep you off your feet. This relationship will help to bring stability and security in your personal life.The married shall bask in the comfort of their conjugal bond. Your relationship will reach a new level of mutual understanding. Your partner shall provide for all your comforts and more. He may gift you something very precious and classy. Some of you may have a grudge that your partner is spending too much time in material pursuits to pay attention to you. You both need to see and understand each other’s point of views.
70.career: You shall now have a better understanding of your work. You are likely to soon see an incredible improvement and progress in your professional life. Those looking for an employment shall be offered a job of their liking. If you are looking for a job change, this is the right time to consider the options available and make the right choice. Do not forget to upgrade your resume. Put all your energies into pursuing the right openings. You may even consider opting for self-employment. Those comfortable in their existing employment, will find the going very smooth. Work conditions will improve; coworkers shall be cooperative. This is the right time to ask for an increment or a well-deserved promotion. You shall also get due recognition and appreciation at work. Time is favorable for business; you shall gain reputation and revenues. You can now proceed with positive energies and confidence. You may accept new offers and openings that come your way. Success is assured as you keep working diligently. You may come across a wise and experienced person who will be able to guide you and assist you in your ventures. You shall see an improvement in your turnover. You may sponsor a social cause or event.
70.finance: Financial status will be quite relaxed. You shall have enough to cover your basic needs and comforts and much more. You have worked quite hard and long; now is the time to enjoy the benefits of your toil. You may earn some additional cash through a promotion or a new job. Money may flow in in the form of pay rise, bonus or perks. You may recover your past dues. You shall be able to handle your finances with practical prudence. The feelings of self-contentment and gratitude will make you more giving. You shall be generous towards the less fortunate. You may consider the increased finances as a blessing and may decide to give back to the Universe through charity. Businessmen shall see success in all their attempts. You shall be able to accomplish some very vital projects which shall be monetarily quite rewarding. Huge profits shall compensate all your hard work. Whatever you do, shall bring in excellent results. Overseas trade will earn higher revenues and more clients. If you have been looking to expanding your business, you may find a suitable partner or financier. Be judicious while making new investments. You may seek an expert’s advice on financial management.

71.name: Seven of Pentacles
71.love: It is time for reflection in affairs of the heart. Your relationship may be proceeding at a very slow pace. You may feel you are putting in a lot into the alliance but are hardly achieving what you really want. This can be quite frustrating. You may be unsure as to whether to continue in the relationship or to end it.  Do not take any decision in a hurry. Just step back and reflect; you have worked real hard for this relationship. If needed, take a break from each other and spend some time with yourself.  Mature and practical thinking will help you to see things from a different perspective. You shall then be able to relieve yourself of all fears and doubts. A shift in outlook may see the revival of your relationship and love will start flowing freely. You may be rewarded with a more intense and passionate togetherness. Those who are single may look out for better and more specific options confidently. Let your intuitions guide you to make the next move. Those in a new relationship may be torn between two suitors. They may have a difficult time making a choice. In case your beloved has moved away from you, do not keep on waiting forever for him. Just move on.
71.career: It is time to enjoy the fruits of your labor. Your past efforts shall ultimately be rewarded. You had been long working with determination towards your goals. You have survived many ordeals. And now you are back on your feet. Things have changed positively and the future looks quite promising. Signs of success are now visible. No doubt, you need a well-deserved break to relax and celebrate your success. But let it be a short one. Do not rest too long on your laurels. You will now have to review your past experiences and decide the future course of action – whether you want to continue on the same lines or whether you want to bring a change in your career or your approach to work. Heed your inner voice to guide you. You shall be turned on by new challenges and are ready to face any upcoming obstacles. Nothing can hold you back now. You have learnt your lessons. Work flow will be smooth. You shall now be able to focus on advancing your career. It is time to start new projects, take on new assignments and set new realistic goals. Regular reviewing will help you make the necessary alterations as required.
71.finance: Your time of abundance and growth has begun. The much awaited financial rewards are on the way. Money will start flowing in making it possible for you to lead a comfortable life now. Sudden gains such as an increment in salary or a big bonus are likely. Do not stress if the revenues are not visible immediately. They may take some time, but shall surely come. You may now be working on a project which shall yield colossal results in the future. You may undertake a new task or make new investments; but do not expect immediate results. Businessmen may profit tremendously from their past ventures. Older investments will yield very good returns. Self-employed and entrepreneurs may get an offer of a partnership with a financially sound person. With so much extra cash coming in, wise investments would be necessary. Do not invest money on risky ventures or speculations. Keep away from gambling. You may also need to review your business and identify those areas which are rapidly exhausting your resources and reducing your profits. You may have to change your attitude towards money and savings. An expert financial professional will help you to manage your finances in the most optimized manner.

72.name: Eight of Pentacles
72.love: You would hardly find any time for your personal life. You are likely to be too busy pursuing your material and career goals to pay attention to your relationships. You are too focused on work to pay attention to your partner. Your business pursuits may disrupt your love life. The sooner you realize this fact, the better for you. You shall then understand that you need to work on enhancing your relationships. Similarly, some of you may not be able to bear the burden of responsibilities that comes with a relationship and you may decide to opt out of the association. You are advised not to take a hasty decision. Do not neglect your domestic life and happiness for material pursuits. The singles will have to take some time off their work if they want to start their love life. Those already in a committed relationship shall be more comfortable and open with each other. You have attained the confidence that your relationship can withstand the test of time. You may have to move away from your beloved or family due to work commitments; it could be a transfer to another location or a long business trip.  You shall now miss your family and understand the importance of domestic bliss and joy.
72.career: You shall see an improvement and progress in your work and dexterity.  The unemployed may be offered a good job offer to work as a trainee or apprentice. The new work will test your expertise and patience; but shall be rewarding all the same. Do not be perturbed by the demands of the profession. Have faith, you are capable of accomplishing this and much more. Set realistic goals and try pursuing them one at a time. You may consider taking up a course to enhance your skills which will help you in giving a better performance. You may seek expert guidance and help from your seniors and supervisors. Freelancers shall be busy with new contracts. You shall get ample opportunities to prove your creative skills and natural aptitudes. You may lay the foundation of a new profitable venture. Entrepreneurs shall see an increase in business and clients. You may have to employ more manpower and resources to keep pace with the increasing demands. Some of you may be disappointed of not getting sufficient returns for your efforts. Do not despair. Your diligence shall be duly and proportionately rewarded in the near future. You need to just keep working persistently towards your goals and objectives.
72.finance: At present, you are working very diligently to achieve your targets and complete your tasks successfully. You aim to improve your monetary status. You can expect a promotion or progression in your career. You may even consider starting an independent business. Whatever route you choose, money shall flow in copiously. You shall be able to consolidate your financial position now. The retired can now expect to receive their retirement funds and benefits soon.  You may even win some monetary reward in recognition of your contribution to the company you work for. Students may work as interns to provide for the expenses of their further education. You may benefit largely from a new skill you have recently learnt. A hobby can be turned into a profitable profession. Financial gains are predicted with a new venture or project. Businessmen shall earn a decent income. Returns may take some time to come. But you shall surely be rewarded for your persistent efforts, sooner or later. If your assignment is nearing completion, you shall see the monetary benefits flowing in soon. A much awaited loan may be approved; you may recover some money which has been stuck for quite some time. Craftsmen and artisans shall be remunerated with commissions and new contracts.

73.name: Nine of Pentacles
73.love: This period speaks of true love and happiness. You shall feel very relaxed, comfortable and secure in the company of your loved ones. The singles who had been feeling quite lonely till this time will find  new love. You shall fall head over heels with this wonderful person who will help you experience meaningful and deep love. Those in a new relationship may be confused about their feelings for each other. It could be that work or some other commitments keep you separated for long periods. You hardly get time to know each other better. Those in an established relationship will proceed to take it to the next logical level. You will experience happiness and a high comfort level with your partner. You shall get more intimate with each other and feel much joy and bliss. The married shall be thrilled with the news of a pregnancy. Love and social affairs shall take the center stage in your life. Your partner shall gain immensely and shall lavish you with gifts and attention. Love wishes shall be granted. You shall pursue your heart’s desire with enthusiasm. Exploring new aspects of your relationship is the best way to kindle a new spark. You shall cherish the candid moments spent with your partner.
73.career: You shall see an improvement and advancement in your career. Those looking for employment will find a job which offers them a much better package than they expected. If employed, you may be elevated to a position where you have greater say in the decision making process and more freedom to do you work. You show good results when you are allowed to do things in your own way – with dedication and persistence. You may be promoted to a more responsible and prestigious position. You shall be able to achieve a much sought after goal successfully. Having achieved your objectives with your hard work, you rightfully deserve a well-earned break now. It is time to explore those areas of life which have long been neglected. Those looking for a job or career change should look out for something much better than their present work. Some of you may be on the verge of taking a retirement from your current job and venturing off into your own business. Businessmen shall experience a period of abundance and resourcefulness. You will approach your work with a freshness that will give you positive results. Your business will expand and your clientele will also grow stronger. You will get the perfect opportunities to rout your competitors and emerge a winner.
73.finance: All your past monetary problems shall now be over and done with. This is a period of enjoying the fruits of your past labors and investments. You shall see stability and growth in your finances. Your new job or career will prove to be very enriching – in financial terms and otherwise. You shall benefit a lot from a windfall gain or an inheritance. Prosperity will be reflected in an up gradation of status and purchasing power. The increased cash flow will allow you to be overgenerous with yourself. You may buy an expensive gift for yourself or for a family member. You may invest in properties, vehicles, a new house, etc. You shall spend considerably on home improvement and travel plans. You will come up with viable strategies and schemes which shall prove to be very lucrative in the long run. Those already in business for some time now will finally start witnessing an improvement. All your previous efforts will pay off well and give you good financial returns and rewards. Past investments will bring in more than the expected returns. You shall be able to clear away all your loans and debts. Be prudent in saving and capitalizing your gains. It would be wise to keep away from speculations.

74.name: Ten of Pentacles
74.love: Personal life would be extremely satisfying and serene. You shall experience growth and happiness in your relationships. You may fall in love with someone who believes in traditions and in maintaining strong family connections. He may be someone in your inner circle – someone from the extended family, a family friend or someone whom you have known since quite some time. Be ready for an opportunity to meet this someone special through an elder family member’s introduction.  However those who are busy pursuing material or career goals would prefer to remain single for the time being. This is a time for laying and building strong foundations for a wonderful future. Those in an established relationship shall decide to take it to the next level. You may decide to get engaged or married. The married may start planning for a baby. The elderly may discuss their future or retirement plans. Those who had had differences between them or had separated temporarily shall now miss their partners. Self-introspection may help them see things from  a new and clearer perspective. You may decide to forgive and forget and finally come back together.  There may be a family get together which you will enjoy immensely.  You are feeling very secure and blissful in this period.
74.career: You shall experience complete fulfillment and stability in regards to your professional life.  You shall be happy and content with the way your career is shaping up. Things are moving in the positive direction. Those looking for a job will find the right one with an impressive pay package.Those in employment may come up with ingenious solutions to solve the existing problems. You have a knack of scrutinizing minute details and coming up with original ideas. You shall be able to successfully achieve your targets. You may be pleasantly surprised to receive a salary increment or a promotion or both. You shall feel very comfortable and contended to have reached the zenith of your career. Your achievements will bring you in the public eye. Those in creative fields or dealing in real estate can expect to progress substantially. Entrepreneurs shall concentrate on advancement of their goals. New and outstanding projects shall be completed with ease and in no time. Those in business need to heed to their intuitions to make the right decisions. Use your own prudence; do not be guided by opinions of others. New doors of opportunities shall open.  Past investments will yield excellent returns.  Business will be on an upswing. You shall be able to effortlessly realize your objectives.
74.finance: This period will bring financial stability and growth. Luck will favor you in a big way in monetary matters.  Additional funds shall enable investments in real estates and other long term assets.  You may purchase a new house or a plot of land. You shall be able to increase your savings and raise your wealth and status. It is time to share this affluence with your family and dear ones. The employed can expect a wage raise or a big bonus. You shall be suitably rewarded and appreciated for all your efforts and improvements which have benefitted your company. You may inherit some large amount or property from family legacy. The retired can make a wise investment of their retirement and gratuity funds. Businessmen shall have enough capital and resources to expand their business.  You may introduce a new line in your existing business or open a new branch.  Your confidence will be at an all-time high. You would venture into new projects. You shall see an increase in profits and funds. This will enable you to lay a strong foundation for the future. It would be wise to opt for long term secure investments. The self-employed shall be able to enjoy excellent prosperity.

75.name: Page of Pentacles
75.love: A close friendship may slowly start blossoming into a new romance. You may find someone interesting at a social gathering or family celebrations. Those already in a relationship may find the spark of romance missing. You may just get bored with each other and one of you may seek a diversion elsewhere. If you are facing some issues in your relationships, it is time to adopt a practical approach to resolve your problems. A lax attitude may mar your relationship. Do not let trivial differences blow up into big complications.  It would be a great idea to have some open talk with each other. Remember sometimes you may have to adapt yourself to others for the harmony and peace of an association.Those who have just broken a relationship may find it difficult to get over the feeling of sorrow and forget their past. Family support shall prove to be a great comfort. They shall help you in taking charge of your life and moving on to a new course. You need to stop fantasizing about a Prince or a Princess sweeping you off your feet. You may come across a very practical and down to earth person whom you can trust and rely upon. This relationship may take some longer time to develop; but the wait would be worth it.
75.career: This period marks a new beginning – could be a new job, a new assignment or a new course of study. You may have to learn a few new things to be able to enhance your productivity and work skills. You shall feel motivated to move out in new areas and make new connections. You are a very good and talented worker; but you need to guard against being too stubborn or egoistic. You should learn to be more accommodating and cooperative. Good coordination between you and your subordinates will help you achieve most of your work goals. An offer of a promotion will fill you with new vigor for the enhance responsibilities. You may now pursue your dreams with the zeal and eagerness of an inquisitive child. This period is auspicious for bringing about stability in your business. You may utilize this time to gather as much information as you can - related to your new business and investments. Long-term goals must be re-examined in the light of recent progress. Be practical and adopt a realistic approach while dealing with problems.  A business opportunity shall present itself from your new contacts. Don’t jump to conclusions about the honesty of a business partner.
75.finance: You shall have an opportunity to earn an additional income – it could be due to a new employment, a new contract, or a new business venture. You shall be more than compensated for your hard work and diligent efforts. However, do not expect any windfall gains. You shall be busy in pursuing your dreams of moving towards a more affluent and prosperous lifestyle. Luck shall favor you from all directions; especially through those known to you. Building up a strong financial foundation is your topmost priority. You may receive sudden unexpected money in large amounts by way of commissions or recovery of some old debts. Things will become clearer on the fiscal front and you may have to adopt a new money-management policy. It is time to get busy with documentations, investigations and investments. Planning and prudent budgeting would be essential to apply the well-earned resources to the best possible use. You may have to seek financial advice from experts to work out a practical way to balance and reallocate your finances for the future. Many options of investments will open up before you.  Focus on a few selected ones which are secure even if they promise not so high returns.

76.name: Knight of Pentacles
76.love: This is a time to introduce stability and positive energy in to your relationships.  A young person of dependable nature is soon to enter your life.  You need to be at the right places to meet him. It may take him some time to accept and declare his love to you. Those in a new relationship will find this time appropriate to propose to each other and promise commitment for life. You have got over the initial stage of romantic mushy love and now you feel comfortable and secure with each other. You have evolved to be a more reliable and trustworthy partner. You are now ready to give your hundred percent to your relationship. If you are in a long term association, you may apply this time to discuss frankly about your future plans. You may apportion duties and responsibilities between yourselves. You understand that good finance is very important to keep a relationship going. You would be ready to take on the role of a provider of the family. The married may find stagnation and boredom setting in their relationship with nothing new or thrilling happening in their love life. You are advised to try out new things; plan some surprises and try to bring the excitement back in your lives.
76.career: Professional life will remain static. Work will get boring and monotonous. Nevertheless you shall be able to complete all the undertaken tasks to satisfaction. You shall come up with a solution to a long persisting problem. Your meticulous approach and efficient execution shall earn your accolades; though the material results may take some time to come. Pay extra attention to details and fine prints; the possibility of mistakes exists. It is important to fulfil all your commitments before the given deadline. It is also possible that some changes may be introduced at your workplace which may not be liked or accepted by you. In such a case, you would seek a change of employment and may apply elsewhere. You would rather prefer to work in an organization where you find stability. The unemployed shall be able to get a job of their choice where they would get a chance to display their ingenuity and talents. You will have to prove yourself to consolidate your position in the firm. You will have to look beyond conservative solutions of working. It is time to learn and adopt new technologies and mechanisms. Businessmen may need to make some important changes in your plans or may have to shift your attitude a bit to accommodate the demands of the changing times.
76.finance: Time is excellent for your professional growth and financial gains. New opportunities will unfold and offer you the most lucrative options of your career. There is something you have been working on since some time now. It will come to a successful conclusion bringing in good returns. You shall see financial improvement very soon. Money would start flowing in from different sources – a new job, a promotion, a bonus, an inheritance – could be just any reason. You possess lots of active energy which you can utilize to achieve many of your goals and progress financially. You may rightfully make some improvements to your lifestyle, and so you can expect your expenses will increase.The self-employed will be confident enough to undertake big projects which will earn substantial profits. Businessmen may be tempted to invest in risky ventures. Be careful not to invest in dubious financial schemes. Handle your finances carefully. Invest your hard-earned money only after conducting necessary investigation and understanding the market conditions well. You may seek financial advice from experts. Long term investment schemes are likely to work better for you. The increased cash flow will make it possible to introduce the much needed changes in your workplace or factory. You can expect huge business from overseas.

77.name: Queen of Pentacles
77.love: It is time to get serious about your personal relations. The singles may find themselves infatuated by an attractive person; take your time to know him/her. Do not rush into things. You may come across someone who is very serene and wise; who loves you for what you are. He could be someone known to you or your friends. This person will provide the much needed stability in your life. You will now feel much contended and secure. The woman entering your life will ‘mother’ you with her love and care. If it is a man entering your life, then he shall value you like a princess. Those in a new relationship shall find your bonding to be very fruitful and strong. You may decide to take this relationship to the next level. You may propose or receive a marriage proposal. The married have lately been through some trying times and have emerged a more mature and committed couple. Now is the time to bask in the shower of love and togetherness.  You shall be a part of social gatherings and parties. Family and friends will experience the warmth and coziness of your hospitality. There could be some good news about a pregnancy or birth in the family.
77.career: Professional life appears vibrant and more stable now. You have worked very hard and made many sacrifices; now is the time to enjoy the fruits of your labor. You are likely to make advancement in your career. A female shall play a significant role in your progress – she can be your boss or a coworker or a friend. Your capabilities and resourcefulness make you a perfect choice for promotions and elevation to leadership positions. Problems will appear; but you shall be able to handle the situation well with your calm attitude and no-nonsense approach. Do not let your decisions be affected by the opinions and words of others; use your own discretion. You are sure to come up with practical solutions.Time is most appropriate to start your own venture. You can starting working on converting your dreams into reality. Your practical vision and execution abilities are heightened in this period. You shall be able to successfully implement your ideas. You need to just focus on your goals. You shall be able to convince and win the trust of your investors and clients alike with your effective communication. You may opt to work from home or set up an office at home itself.
77.finance: You have worked quite hard and have made many sacrifices. This is the pay-back time. You shall now feel financially secured. You will surely be rewarded for your efforts – and in a big way. Financial luck shall bring in prosperity and gains. You shall be blessed with abundance – be it through an increment, profits in business, a bonus or a well-deserved reward. You shall witness an improvement in your overall standard of living. It is time to adopt a sensible saving strategy. At the same time, do not forget to enjoy the fruits of your labor. You can grant yourself the luxury of shopping items of personal and family comforts and luxuries. It would give you immense happiness to share a part of your affluence with the less fortunate ones. This is a great time for new fiscal opportunities. Entrepreneurs shall make a fresh start and embark upon a new productive cycle. Your business venture will be a big success. Finances shall surely multiply. Past investments shall prove to be very profitable. You need to wisely consider how to make your money work for you in an optimum manner –you may consult a financial expert who would be able to guide you to proper investments.

78.name: King of Pentacles
78.love: You shall experience a rise in passion and romance. The unattached can look forward to an exciting phase in their personal lives with many positive things happening. Your alluring charisma will attract many admirers.  You shall be suddenly swept off your feet and before your realize, you shall be hopelessly in love. Your beau will not only be a gem of a person, but shall a sound financial background too. You may find that you two have many things in common. You can decide to shape a happy future together. You are advised to be absolutely honest in your relationship. There is also no need to try to be someone that you are not. Just be yourself and be loved for what you really are. Those already in a relationship may have some serious issues between yourselves which may create a rift or a misunderstanding. This is a time to consciously work towards resolving the problems and strengthening your relationship. Do not try to dominate or control your partner. Some of you may decide to go on a honeymoon and/or plan to have a child. Guests at home will brighten up your family life. You shall relish the cordial relations you enjoy with your friends and close social groups.
78.career: Professional life will be stable. You have worked very hard and reached a milestone in your career. Good income and respectable position give you a comfortable feeling. You now need to take a short break and relax in the quietude of a private holiday. But some work pressures still exist; you will have to deal with them with patience. You are capable of handling such issues. Your boss or an older experienced person in the office shall prove to be a mentor and a guide to you. He shall help you achieve your goals. Initially you may be put off by his strictness and temperamental nature; but slowly you will realize he has your interests at heart. Those looking for a new job will come across a good offer with excellent pay package and promising prospects. Businessmen shall be successful in their business dealings. You shall come across a viable business opportunity. You have all that it takes to convert this small project into a big empire. Your venture shall be successful and shall make considerable profits in the time to come. But be cautious and conduct a thorough check before investing your time and money. Some influential person with a sound judgment and practical foresight will help you realize your dreams and goals.
78.finance: You shall be successful in bringing stability in your financial matters. You have been working quite hard and have succeeded in accumulating material possessions. Destiny favors you in money matters. You can expect to earn a good sum of money – from an increment, a bonus, etc. Old investments will pay you handsomely.  Cash flow will surely and steadily increase; but only as an outcome of hard work and determined efforts.   Do not expect any windfall gains. Freelancers shall have a field day with new assignments. Spend this newly found income in a judicious manner. Do not splurge on unnecessary expenses or wasteful purchases.Businessmen shall be happy to deal with increased clientele and rising number of orders. Having achieved most of your goals, you are now ready to explore new avenues of success. You shall have enough funds which you can choose to either invest in profitable schemes or start a new venture altogether. It would be prudent to complete all the preliminary investigations about the investment / project and if necessary, seek professional advice in such matters. Wise business decisions and tactful investments shall bring you more revenues, which you will rightfully and magnanimously share with the less fortunate ones.
